I am 5’8” and ordered the large. It’s a little loose on me. I might’ve been able to go with the medium. I haven’t decided whether to keep this size or go for the smaller size but they’re very soft and comfortable.

DO SOFT, SO COMFORTABLE, SOOOO CUTE ON!! The look like jeans but feel like Yoga pants (and I’m a Yoga teacher so I wear a lot of Yoga pants 🤪)!! These are incredibly comfortable and I can see myself wearing these a lot and getting rid of some jeans!! I love the white stitching and the bell bottoms!! (Super cute with this Black sweater with white stitching!-also from Amazon!) 10/10 Recommend! 5’3” @135 size S

This dress was so adorable and very soft. I was worried it would’ve stiff with it being denim. It was very comfy. Definitely one of my new favorites. I usually wear a medium (size 7/8 pants) and got the medium and it fit perfect. I’m 5’5 if that helps you judge the length.

I really want to like this dress more, I just don't like how it looks on me. It's pretty good quality and lightweight. Would be a nice dress for warmer fall days and I like the denim/country vibe it has. I love that it has pockets! That's always a plus for any dress. It's also very comfortable and seems pretty versatile (you can style it with boots, heels, tennis shoes and it will still work). The waist is flattering and I like the detail on the skirt a lot. I did not have the odor issue that I read about in other reviews (maybe it depends on the color you order). I'm just not a fan of how it looks on me. It feels a little too "Little House on the Prairie" for me. It may be because it's a little big on the top, or maybe because it's still wrinkled since I haven't washed it yet. I just don't find the top portion of the dress to be very flattering. For reference, I'm 5'3", 120 lbs and I ordered a small.

I am 9 months pregnant in this picture & I feel like this dress minimizes that! Which is amazing! I don't feel massive in it.. I feel pretty and dainty which is hard to do at this stage. The denim is light, like it's not hard & thick which I love! It's soft & I am happy i ordered the black but I honestly want to go back and order like the blue denim too! That's how comfortable and cute I feel in this dress. It's literally perfect for fall! Throw on some boots & you are looking so cute & you did it super easy! Which as a new mom that is literally the best thing I can ask for! Also the fact that I can wear this pregnant & not pregnant ... I mean... This dress will be a staple for many years to come! That is another thing, it is very classic like I don't think this type of dress will ever really "go out of style" I can wear this until it has holes in it - which given its well made would probably take like 8 years at least lol! I also feel like it minimizes my large breasts as well which I am thankful for. Especially since it's low cut. I am a 35 year old son to be mother of two I don't want my girls busting out everywhere. Also it's made in such a way where even though it's not made for breastfeeding I can easily pull it down over one side to feed my baby after she is here. No weird smells when I opened. Definitely worth every penny.

I love these so much, but they just don’t fit the way I want them to on my body and at my current measurements. I am 44, 154lbs., 5’3”, 35” waist, 41” hips, 41” bust. This is the size 10, which has to sit at my natural waist in order to button. The actual waist measures 34”. My waist is 35”. It looks cute, but it’s not very comfortable because it’s tight. Not tight like it’s too small, it is not too small, I just like my waistband to be looser. The size 12 product waist measurement is 35.5” -36”. That one fit great, allowing me to wear them slouchy, which is what I want, but then the crotch is too long. 😭

I absolutely love these! I am 5 foot 9 and unfortunately barrel jeans are generally extremely short on me even though I love them. These were short as soon as I put them on, but… there was about 1 3/4” hiding under the hem so I used a seam ripper to let them out and they are perfect! It took me about 10 minutes to do this and now they are perfect length wise. The only downside is the waist was a little tight however, the rest of the pant is very baggy… Which is good and what you want for barrel jeans. I just wet the waistband, and put in my handy waist stretcher that I got off of Amazon-let them dry and it gave me an extra inch so now they fit much better and I can wear them low rise, which adds even more length to the pants. These are fantastic.

Comphy. I was hesitant on getting the larger size. Im 5’2 and 145 pounds. I usually fit into an 8-10. Amazon kept telling me size 12 would fit me best. I was hesitant but went with the larger size recommendation. Initial try on and I thought they were too big until I read the tag which says said 72% cotton. Im sure they will shrink down to fit me. If you don’t mind washing in cold water & hanging to dry, then go with your original size.

These Luvamia jeans shorts are super cute and very soft and comfortable to wear. They are short but not obscene, they are stretchy without looking un-jeans-like, and the pockets are deep enough to hold my phone. I got the “classic blue” and the dye smelled like dye, so I decided to launder separately in case it bled. I’m glad I did that because a check of the water halfway through looked darker than clear. The style is spot on, but the construction is a bit slapdash with the stitching. I’ve included pictures so you can see what I mean, but it’s mainly just a little fraying, untrimmed threads and a bit of bird’s nesting on the tacks. I can forgive it but I want people to be aware that these are not perfect quality and not what I would expect for $27.99. That said, dang are these adorable or what?They run true to size and fit me just the way I want shorts to fit. I’m 5’7”, 203 pounds and I got the size XL. I generally wear a size 16 in bottoms and my waist is smaller but my hips larger than average for a person my general size. Often I’ll get something fitted and they will be tight through the thighs. These are fitted but not tight. They fit at the top near my waist and all the way through the rest of the fit. I have about an inch of slack around each thigh and it’s also that they are stretchy. Overall, I like them. If you have a very curvy figure like me and struggle to fit waist AND thighs in the same garment, these could be for you. The value is in the fit and style though, not really the finishing touches.

These are so comfortable and cute as well!! For reference: I am 5'5", 159-162lbs most of the time. Depending on the brand, I can wear an L to XL. Oftentimes I have to rely on reviews, because measurements don't always work right for me. This may have been one of those time, lol, if there had been a bunch of reviews. For my hips atleast, it seamed I needed an XL, where my tummy could have gone with a L, but got XL because I'd rather it be too big than too small. (note: maybe pay more attention to waist size than hip size. Doing hip size is loose in both areas) They are a good bit large, but mostly in the waist. (showed in a pic. very loose because there is elastic, usually they are too tight with elastic tho, so not complaining, lol) First, these are made very well. Feels more like denim than the stretchy pants feel of a lot of jeans I've gotten over the last few years. The button and zipper are real, but with mine being loose in the waist, I had no need to use it). Lots of good, use-able pockets! I love pretty much everything. I am really comfortable in these, even if I don't personally look sexy in them, lol. Don't know if a different size would have helped that. My shape has just changed and I am learning to work with it. On my 5'5" frame, they cam a little longer than what I would personally call capri. They seem more boyfriend jean to me, especially the fit. I ended up folding up the bottoms 1 level in the last pic, just to show how that would look. I really love them, with the knowledge that I wish I'd gone a size smaller and they were just a bit shorter. Well made and highly recommended.

Very high quality denim and stitching on these capri pants. I could just feel the sturdy quality in the denim and the stitching was perfect everywhere. These would hold up to lots of wear. The fabric had been pre-washed and the denim had the washed features of some variations in hues in places which looked normal. The pockets were ample. The fabric actually stretched a bit which made these SO comfortable! The XL fit me perfectly which would be true to size for an XL. I am about 5'6" and 170 pounds in the pic so you can see the fit and length. They felt really good and I could move in them even with the heavier sturdy denim. They did not choke my tummy at all so there was not a "muffin top" effect. These are very comfy and sturdy well-done capris. I would definitely recommend to my family or friends. See my pics for details.

These are very nice capris. The weight of the fabric is excellent - feels like nice heavyweight denim, but they are quite stretchy. The size was as expected. I am 5'-8" and wear a size 12 and the large fit really well, not too tight, not too loose. I like the cargo style and the stitching and construction seems to be of a high standard. The color was as shown, an overall washed denim. I think these will last a long time based on the weight of the fabric and the quality of construction.

Very comfortable, silky feeling on the inside, flattering style, great subtle flowery pattern and color. I know the sleeves are supposed to be a little long and have that great fluted look, but the sleeves are ridiculously too long! See picture I uploaded. Granted, the sleeves are long on an XXL but followed the size chart and had to get an XXL because of my 43" bust (XXL on the size chart said the bust is 43.3") Everything else fits well, though I like my tops a little looser (because of my pot belly) vs the style of this top as suggested in the pictures. So, if you have a nice figure and want it to look more like the style in the pictures, I'd get a size or two down. I'd like to get this in other colors - lots of fun colors to choose from but wish the sleeves weren't so long. I was able to roll up the sleeves but they don't stay rolled up well and messes up the look.

This top is a total win. I got it in the wine color and it is gorgeous. The double lining in the torso means it is not see through and you can wear a regular bra with it which is a big plus for me. The sleeves are a single layer and have a pretty flare at the wrist that gives it a more dressed up, classy feel. The fabric is soft and stretchy so it is really comfortable while still flattering. I am 5’7 and 150 pounds and the medium fits perfectly.

This is a high quality top in a vivid blue color. The top is stretchy and form fitting, but not extremely tight. I found it comfortable to wear. The fabric feels thick and the lace is beautiful in person. It is not see through at all and the length is perfect, not too short, not too long. I love the bell shape on the sleeve as it gives the top a more youthful look. I am 5'8, 175 lbs and ordered my normal size large.

This is a very nice blouse. I got the large and it fit perfectly. The embroidery and bell sleeves are very pretty. I like that there is an extra layer underneath so that it isn’t see through. For reference I am 5’1, 173lbs and a 36DD. This isn’t a cheap material but definitely a wash only to keep the top intact

I am 180 lbs, 5’6”, and normally a size 12 pant so I ordered the size large. They fit perfectly for me and now are one of my favorite pairs of jeans. However, the front pockets do not stay tucked in. I think I’m going to have them sewn shut to prevent this. I like wearing these with a long shirt or sweater. I’ve probably washed these 25 times right in my washer and dryer. They still look and fit the same way. These are not stretchy or sweat pants material. They feel like soft jeans. They are a great price considering jeans run twice as much as these cost. I like some of their other jeans so now that I know they are a quality pants will buy from this brand.

I really liked these pants and was fully planning to give them 5 stars until they ripped. They are true to size and fit me well. The fabric is lighter than denim, which I actually loved for hot and warm weather, it’s breathable, comfortable, and easy to wear all day. They also look very stylish; I’m a fan of wide-leg pants, and the length was great. I’m 5'8" and they hit right at my ankles without dragging on the floor. Unfortunately, the main issue is the stitching. The seams didn’t hold up as expected, which caused them to rip despite normal wear. It’s disappointing because everything else about these pants was great, but the seam quality really affects their durability

I’m a 60 yr old, 5’5” female. I weigh 160lbs & carry extra weight in my tummy which is approx 35.” Comfort is a huge priority, but I still enjoy being stylish. These Roswear sweatpant style bottoms are not only super comfy but also very on trend. Two of my favorite brands are Free People & Madewell and these pants mesh extremely well with both. Per the sz guide, I ordered these in XL, but could’ve easily gone down to a Large. I do prefer an oversized fit and oftentimes size up to achieve that look. For reference my hips are 42” and my thighs measure 22” around. I’m also very short waisted. Although I received these through Amazon Vine at a discounted price in exchange for this review, I feel the full price of approx $37 is extremely fair. Based on how these do in the wash, am buying another pr on my own. If no shrinkage occurs, am going to try sz Large because I’m curious how those will fit compared to XL. (Will also update my review). For now I highly recommend these cuties. If you prefer a very baggy fit, stick with your typical sz, but if not, I highly suggest going down 1 sz for a slightly less oversized fit. Keep in mind (I believe) these are not meant to be tight or body conscious.

I RARELY write reviews I haven’t worn jean shorts in years but I’ve lost 30lbs and wanted to try them again for an upcoming family vacation. I bought a size 10 I’m 5’3 170lbs apple shape. These are the best jean shorts ever! I bought 3 pairs they have a nice short stretch and don’t gap at the back. They’re a decent length too not long but not super short. I love that they’re not cuffed as I tried cuffed ones and they made my thighs look even larger. I highly recommend these. I’ve told all of my friends!
Love these shorts! They're thick, well-made, and stay in place really well. I'm 4'8 and about 105-110 lbs and size 4 fits me nice and snug. Definitely recommend!
Flattering and sexy. I love how feminine this vest is. I get compliments all the time. Also makes my girls look pretty excellent. I’m 5’2, 117 lbs and ordered a size S.

I thought I wouldn’t like the razor back but it doesn’t bother me at all. The buttons don’t gap in the front which is really nice, and I bet it will look super cute with a shirt underneath! Right as I got it though, it went on sale - so definitely keep a look out for that 😭 otherwise a great vest! (I’m 5’6 & 175 lbs btw)

First, I have to say the material and quality is very high. I bought a size large based off the reviews. I am a size 10/12 and 34G boobs. The XL has at least a five inch gap on the side top and bottom. If it was the right size, I bet it would snatch you to the gods. As a big boob person, I am always worrying about shirts with buttons pulling at the chest , and I don’t think that would happen here at all. Buy it but size down!

These shorts will be great for someone that they actually fit. I went according to the size chart & got a small. Now I did expect them to be somewhat baggy on me which would’ve been fine but these are huge. They are soft & offer a wide selection of colors but the fit for me just isn’t there. These appear to be of nice quality & I’m sure they’ll look great on someone they fit. I can’t even attempt to pull this look off. Reference ~ I’m 5’ 96 lbs in a size small.

These shorts fit great but they don’t look so great on, especially if you’re 5’2”! I like them enough but i will be cutting them a bit shorter- like 5” inseam. They have a nice stretch, the fabric is thick enough but not really heavy, and fit great size-wise. For reference, i weigh 135lbs, wear a size 27-28 in levi’s/j crew/madewell or 2 (sometimes 4) from go/old navy.

These Bermuda wide cuff jean shorts are well made. The material is soft and breaths well. There is a good amount of stretch in the fabric. For thickness, they are between a medium and thin. The wide cuff is stitched, so it stays cuffed at all times. They have 5 pockets, 2 back, 2 front, and a small one that I call a watch pocket. The button and zipper both work as they should. I like the style mostly, but the wide cuff I'm still deciding on, lol. The legs are fairly roomy, even for my chubby legs. The shorts are very comfortable, whether sitting or actively doing something. I ordered this pair of shorts in a size XL, which is my normal jeans/pants size. They fit me quite comfortable in all areas. By the way, in my photos it looks like one leg of the shorts is longer than the other, most noticeable with the back facing photos. That is my fault as I have one leg that is longer than the other. The shorts are evenly matched for length. For reference: I'm 5' 4" tall, 33-ish waist, 44" hips, and 182 lbs. I'm happy with these Bermuda shorts and will recommend them. The fit is great, as well as the quality. The current price (12-16-2025) of $27.99 is a fair value, in my opinion. There are several color options to choose from.

This skirt was purchased for my wife, who is 5 ft 3 in and 167 lbs, and the size Large fit her perfectly. She literally said it felt like it was made just for her. The denim feels very durable and well-made, not thin or cheap at all, but still comfortable thanks to the stretch. The high waist is flattering, and the raw hem gives it a nice casual look that can be dressed up or down. She absolutely loves this skirt and already said she wants it in multiple shades of denim. Definitely a great purchase and true to size.

LOVE the look and feel of this skirt! - It has 2% spandex but it feels like so much more. It has just the right amount of stretch. - I ordered my normal size LARGE and it fits great. I have 37” waist and 44” hips. I have a little bit of muffin top going on but it will be hidden by a shirt and it doesn’t feel too tight. ❌ Not a complaint but if it had built in shorts, that would bring this skirt over the top.

Love this sweatshirt! I’m 5’8” , 165lbs and I ordered a large and an XL. The large is slightly oversized and the XL is as well, but not too big or baggy at all. I washed and dried them both and the material stays soft and doesn’t get wrinkly after one wash. Love this purchase and will buy buying another color soon.

Very good quality and cute. I wasn’t sure it would be long enough for leggings, or if it would be decent material. But, I am impressed. I will buy this in more colors. Soft fleece inside, not too thick. I am 5’7 135 pounds and this is how it lays on me. I got a size large. Picture reviews always help me, especially with clothes so hopefully this can help you!! Definetly buy. It’s worth your $.

LOVE this. I am recently postpartum and was looking for something cozy and comfortable to wear. I love the hot pink color- it’s fun and looks like the color in the photo. Normally I am a small but I tried different sizes to see how the style would look (small, large and XL). I ended up staying with the XL because I really like it oversized and the length, can wear with leggings. I am 5’6 and right now weigh 146lbs. It is great quality, thick and I liked the proportions of this size best. Plus I feel like as I drop baby weight I will still be able to wear this! Highly recommend

This item is meant to be an oversized sweatshirt . I bought it in the color blue grey and color is just as pictured. I ordered a size small, I’m 5’3” and 115 lbs. the inside is lined and so soft. I also consider this a doop for the FP mock neck sweatshirt

5'4, 105 lbs, 40BSize top: LargeColor: BluegreenLooks more like a mint than a bluegreen, but it's still a pretty color. A very soft, lightweight, stretchy fabric that would be great for Spring/Summer. It's a little large for me, but I'll wear it around the house. I like oversized clothing. I'm gonna order a size Medium next. It's not made of cotton so I don't suppose it's going to shrink. Hasn't been washed yet, only tried on. This top is very long and goes well past my booty. It doesn't wrinkle, so that's a big plus and it might work well with some palazzo pants. Attached are the measurements for a size Large. I will order again, but in a Medium.I hope this helps customers :)

I like this shirt so far. It’s cute for business casual which is how I have to dress for work. It’s a little long but it’s okay if it’s tucked in. Only thing is if wearing a black compression tank top it’s a little see through. Shouldn’t be a problem with a beige one. I ordered a Large and I like how it fits on me. For reference I’m 5’3, 160-165lbs and carry most of my weight in my mid section. Haven’t washed it yet so I can’t speak to that yet. Overall I’m happy with the purchase 😌

Way too long! I’m 5’6 with a slim build and I ordered a size small. The shirt goes past the crotch of my pants and fully covers my butt. This would be good if you want to cover your butt with leggings but it’s not exactly the look I was hoping for. The other down side is that you can see my bra when I lift my arm because the arm hole is so wide.

Wish the side pocket were deeper, for my cell phone, and would prefer a zipper instead of a flap, and wish it was on the right side. I'm keeping them though because hard to find softer, not too wide, shorts, with a little stretch like these. I also wish they were an inch longer to better cover an unsightly blemish above my knee when I sit down, but oh well. The lighter pair were size XL , risky for my 5'3, 166lbs, but fit, maybe even better than the dark pair I got in XXL, at least until I wash them! I fold the flap in to allow for the cell phone. Might cut it off entirely or get creative& splice it on top of the pocket. I put my phone case in the pocket so you can see it's depth. Samsung S10+.

These Bermuda shorts fit true to size, which is nice, since there is another pair on Amazon that does not fit true to size. I ordered a size M, and I'm 5'5" and 112 lbs., with a waist of 30 1/2". These have some really nice stretch, and the size chart is accurate for the waist size. The waist can be too large or too small for me in size M's, but the stretch makes these fit perfectly. The color is a nice dark blue, and the length is great if you don't want really short shorts, but you don't want the weight and heat of longer capris in the summer. These will be great for quick errands, the beach or even to do some painting in your house. That seems to be what I always wear to paint something, lol. The side pockets are comfortable and I like the normal look of them in these Bermuda shorts. The cargo pockets are a nice addition for carrying notes or even flat, extra tissue. I would recommend these to anyone; they are very comfortable and versatile.
So soft, and comfy! I’m 5 Feet 6’, and followed the size chart. This is the apricot version, and it’s more like a cream, but I love it. Highly recommend!!

The fabric is super soft and cozy, like those old Gibson tops from Nordstrom — brushed, stretchy, and perfect for lounging or layering. It feels higher quality than I expected at this price. I’m a true petite (5’1”, 180 lbs, usually 16P/XLP/33P) and while the material is dreamy, the fit just wasn’t right for my body type. It’s a bit clingy around the mama edges (iykyk) and the sleeves run long. That said — if you’ve got a little more confidence (or a body that isn’t shaped like a postpartum power hour snack enthusiast), this one’s a no-brainer. The quality and comfort are chef’s kiss.

I’m a fan of this soft and cozy pullover that’s perfect for cooler weather. The polyester/rayon/spandex material has a wide rib design and “brushed” stretchy fabric. The top has a simple crew neckline and three angled button accents on the left and right. The buttons are for show only, ie, they don’t open. The sleeves have a 2-1/2” slightly fitted cuff to keep my wrists warm. As far as size, I ordered a Medium (5’4” – 125 lbs) and the fit is a bit loose so I can wear a cami or lighter top underneath. The sleeves are longish, creating a slight ballooning above the cuffs. The length is like a tunic, falling just below my hips. I really like this versatile top that I can wear on casual days or to dress up a nice pair of slacks or skirt for work.

I am 5’3” and about 150# athletic build usually a size 27 or 28 in jeans and got the medium in these and they fit perfectly - actually I am very pleasantly surprised how well they fit and how comfortable they are. I have a 25” inseam and these are also the perfect length for me. The barrel cut doesn’t look very barrely on me but I’m not sure if that is because of my build - I have large thighs and butt. I am happy with the cut though as I have tried some barrel jeans that are very circus-ish. These are a good in between. The denim quality is ok, I have some expensive jeans and the denim quality isn’t up there with those but for the price I didn’t expect it to be. The distressing is fun and works well. The shoelace belt thing is a bit ordinary so I may look to switch that out to elevate them a bit. Overall I am extremely happy with these for the price and feel like I will wear them a lot.
I didn’t like barrel jeans when they came out, since I am 5’4” I didn’t think they would look on me. I was wrong! They look fantastic! This ones are light weight and comfortable. Very chic and unique

I don’t know how to show this color for what it truly is. The photos in the ad are accurate. This is a beautiful shade. It isn’t yellow or dirty white. It’s like the perfect color of neutral you are looking for. The fit is oversized and I like it. The button size is accurate for the shirt and they are nice buttons that pair well with this shirt. The sleeves are almost proportionate to the oversized body. There may be something slightly off about this shirt. It may be the difference in the hem line between the front and the sides? Not sure. When I tuck it in sort way, I don’t love it as much as I do with another shirt I own of a similar style. Either way it’s worth the purchase and the material is nice, medium thickness, not see through, and a decent quality. I say go for it. I ordered the large and I am 36/38 C/158/5’2”

This is a great heavyweight corduroy shirt. This is the kind of shirt that takes me back to the '90s, and I love it. Keep in mind that this is BIG. I am five foot one and about 125 pounds and got the small. It is not overpowering, but if I had gotten a medium, I would be swimming in this. The arms are pretty long on me. Buttons all work as expected. It's super cozy, would make a great "shacket" in the south.

I love this shirt but it does run large even for an oversized style shirt. I ordered a medium and it is pretty baggy on me (5’6” and 154#). A small in this shirt probably would have fit me but normally I wear between a large or medium depending on the cut. That said, I love how comfortable and warm this shirt is. I can easily wear it over other shirts when the weather calls for layering. The green corduroy pairs well with jeans and the oversized styling makes it a natural to wear with leggings. It washes well and doesn’t wrinkle at all, definitely wash and wear!

Bring on my favorite season of all, I'm ready for fall! I've not had corduroy in my wardrobe for awhile, but with autumn around the corner, its time to bring that fabric back. This shirt is phenomenal and looks better than pictured. On the model, I feared it would be a flowing blouse top printed stripe "corduroy-like" stripes. Instead, the material it is a nice substantial corduroy - perfect for layering. Its not as thick as a warm denim jacket, nor as thin as cotton. I couldn't believe my luck when I put on this shirt and the sleeves were long enough for my long, gangly arms. I often end up with shirts that reach just above my wrists, so I roll up the sleeves to avoid the "high waters" sleeve look (is that a thing?). I would call this sage green not grey-green. With brown buttons, its the perfect autumnal shirt. I selected a size large so I could wear it over t-shirts for football games and chilly walks through corn mazes. I'm 5'10" 150-155lbs, and probably have gone with a medium if I planned to wear it as a shirt.

I tried on this corduroy oversized shirt hoping I could pull it off. I’m 5’2”, 130 lbs, and a mom of five, and I thought maybe—just maybe—it would magically make me look like all those Instagram models who rock these shirts. At first, I wilted. It wasn’t just oversized, it was HUGE. I despaired, because it’s such a cute style and I loved the color layered over a fitted black shirt with black jeans. But then… I uploaded my pictures, started writing this review, and actually LOOKED at them. And you know what? I can pull this off! It’s huge, comfy, trendy, and I’m loving it. It covers my behind and works perfectly with jeans, leggings, a fitted skirt—you name it. I'm keeping it and wearing it everywhere!

Have worn these out our wash’s then yet, but first try on they fit AMAZING. For reference, I’m 185lbs, 5’9 and bout an XL I was fully expecting them to be too short for my 32” inseam, but they hit perfectly to have about a 1-2” heeled shoe. The material is a bit more muted/matte with a slightly silver sheen. The pockets are somewhat small but still useable to carry things in.

I bought the Lover Premium Women’s Faux Leather Coated Flare Pants and while they were super cute, they were really long. I had to get 4 inches cut off just to wear them comfortably. For reference, I’m 155 lbs and purchased a size Medium, it fit perfectly! I wore them to a Shakira concert and felt like a total rockstar. If you’re on the shorter side, be ready for some hemming, but once tailored, these pants are fire!

These pants are super cute and comfortable. I spent all night bar hopping and dancing and they held up. I’m 5’6” and usually wear a small so that’s what I ordered. It fit great on my waist but oh my gosh were these long. I had to hem them and took off probably 3 inches. If you can sew or don’t mind a little chop job I think they’re worth it.
I’m 6ft 150 and these pants fit perfect and are long enough! Exactly as I expected.

I am 5'6" just weighed in at 150Lb. I ordered medium. I went with the thy circumference and hoped the waist was forgiving, and it was. Fortunately the pants are stretchie. I like the pants for what I bought them for. But it is not great material. It is not leather. It is more like plastic and definitely won't last but will be fun for our outing and if I'm lucky I will get a couple more wares out of them. I wish it was a little cheaper just because of the quality of the material. If they were cheaper I could have given another star.
I’m 5 foot 7, weigh about 160 lbs and got a size medium they fit great and are so cute!

Love them!!! Curvy girl friendly if you got a big bottom! I thought it was gonna be too tight but you gotta stretch into them for the first wear. They are stretchy! I can walk in these comfortably! No weird smell out the package or anything. Great material. Fits so nicely!!! Perfect length as well as I’m 5’6! Ignore messy room lol

I’m very pleased with this shirt. Its stylish and the perfect weight for layering—warm without feeling bulky or overheating, or perfect to wear by itself. The ribbed fabric is flowy, soft and comfortable against my skin, and the sleeves offer plenty of room for movement with an ideal arm length. The hem falls nicely and has a flattering fit. After washing, the fabric softened even more, which was a pleasant bonus. For reference, I’m 5'4", 164 lbs, and ordered a size large. It fits true to size. The shirt appears well made, with solid stitching that should hold up well over time. Overall, this shirt delivers excellent value for the price. Its versatility allows it to pair just as well with casual sweatpants as with more polished outfits. I would definitely recommend it.

The AUTOMET Womens Long Sleeve Shirt is perfect for early Spring, in the Texas Panhandle, when the cool wind doesn't require a jacket, but you need long sleeves to cover your arms. The days start out cold, and then, they warm up a little, before cooling off, again, in the evening; that is what makes this thinner, breatheable sweater perfect--not too hot, not too cold. The material is very soft and is not clingy. I really like the curved hemline, which flatters your waist and hips and is very forgiving if you have a baby belly pooch, after having kids. ;) The solid Maple color is rich and BEAUTIFUL. I'm 5'3", 165 lbs, and I feel comfortable in the XL size. I bought several colors!

The color is as shown. I ordered a large. It fits as expected. Loose. Fabric is soft. It is thin and a little see through. May work for layering. I am 162 lbs , 5'6", 38D. I haven't washed it so I dont know how it'll do with the washer and dryer. I gave it a 3 star because its not a high quality product but its nice Similar to Shein if you've ever purchased from them.

These jeans fit like a dream in the waist and hips. I have recently lost a lot of weight and I am 54 and 178 pounds. I ordered a medium cause I like my jeans a little long to go over my shoes or boots. Unfortunately, these are 6 inches too long. I ordered the 16 regular. I think I’m going to keep them and have them hemmed because mailing them back as a pain. I don’t know if they were Miss marked or if they just run this long.

I love these jeans!! I’m 5’0”, 115lbs so I knew I’d have to cut/hem them but I was good with that. They are now the perfect length. Material is soft yet durable. They hug in all the right places without feeling like you can’t breathe or will bust a seam. I ordered a second pair. When they get the lighter color back in stock I’ll be ordering those as well. Must purchase!!

Definitely more of a low rise (perfect) a bit of a flair but not crazy, just enough to go over boots/shoes. Stretchy but not form fitting, comfortable. I’m 5’5 and they are a bit long even with a wedge but not enough that it takes any stars away!
These jeans are so comfortable and hold their shape. I took this picture after having them on for 10 hours of travel time. I ordered size 4 short. I am 5' 4" 130 lbs.
So comfy! Very cute too. Fit perfect. I’m 5ft y’all so I did have to cut the bottoms of them but I do that with everything. Very durable & easy to clean.

Love love love! Was worried this was going to be that thin cotton, no stretch material but it’s really great! Stretchy knit feel which makes it conform to you. I’m 5’7” 150 lbs and bought a medium and it fits perfect!

LOVE!! This top is super cute and flattering for a not-so-tiny figure, and probably the smaller or those more able to be athletic as well. I am 5'5", 159-162 lbs. I normally wear an L to an XL. I am technically a 38 in the bust, but when they say 40 for a size, I usually know to size up, atleast for a little room in the waist. So I got an Xl for that reason, but could have gotten by with an L, because it does fit loose. (I wasn't sure if it would have stretch) First, I love the bandana pattern I got! (Floral Red 870) Soo cute! (Also LOVE the v neck, believing its so much more flattering than rounded neck, atleast on me) Right out of the shrink wrapped package, the wrinkles pretty much fell away. Loved this about it too. I hung it for about an hour before the pics, but didn't really need to, I just had others that did need it) I am learning to use wider straps in tank tops, so that's still an issue for me thinking something is attractive for me, but I do like the shape and the hem at the bottom *the way it is rounded and comes up a bit at the sides*. I washed in warm (because I always do) and hung to dry. No wrinkles after, and no shrinkage. Ready to go when you are. Its a nice, soft material - not too thick or warm, but not see-thru thin either. I am going to have so much fun with this. Very happy, and I think its a good value, especially with the current coupon code.

Love! Only complaint is the roll up part on the bottom of the shorts constantly come undone, I’m having them sewn permanently. Other wise loved for my trip to New Orleans. I’m over 200 pounds and carry my weight in my belly and arms.

Sizing info first off: I'm 5'1" and weigh 125. I usually wear a 2 or a 4, or a Small, in bottoms. I ordered these overalls in a S and that seems to have been about right. I could probably fit into an XS to get it looking less baggy at the waist, but wouldn't get the overall slumpy look I was going for then. With that out of the way, let's go over some cons: my main complaint is that these are much shorter than I anticipated them being. That's not to say they're obscenely short or anything, but when I sit down I feel like these are Very Short. I'd guess these have maybe a 4" inseam? A second con is that the straps are...flimsy isn't quite the right word, as the fabric appears to be of a good thickness, but the length sliders don't move easily, and when they do, the fabric of the straps folds and clumps up, making adjusting the straps even harder. Now, some pros: the fabric seems to be real denim, not a polyester imitation, and has a good thickness to it. The stitching on the folded leg hems seems strong and more than adequate. These run true to size and the color I received matches the color in the listing. The hip pockets are real pockets, big enough to fit my phone, which in this day and age of fake pockets, is a big deal to me. Overall, if you don't mind a short inseam and somewhat annoying straps, these are a solid buy. I anticipate them lasting well.
Great fit, soft and stretchy and seem durable so far. I am 5’3, 160lbs and ordered a medium and I love the mid thigh length!

These run big. I am typically a medium (5'4" @150lbs) and these are not as tight as I’m used to in my leggings. They are also a tad too long. They are comfy tho. And the fleece inside def adds the warms. The black color is also in the blue side. At first I had thought they sent me navy blue leggings. Lastly, the pockets are in front, not the sides like typical leggings. It might not be a deal breaker for you. The placement like jean pockets — for me however, sticking my phone in there as I go for a morning walk is uncomfortably. The phone is uncomfortable when walking. So overall I give them ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️. Not 💯 for me knowing my needs, but generally speaking, not a bad purchase at all. I may return them. We’ll see. 🤷🏻‍♀️
These leggings are fleece lined! I love how soft they are. I am 6'3 and they hit me right at the top of the ankle. I got a large, I would prefer them to be a little longer but still love them!

This is not the warm and sturdy product I thought it was and it is not friendly to smaller sized wearers. The material is flimsy and baggy. I bought the smallest size available (s-m) and it bunches up around the legs and groin like loose pants. I’m 5’4 and 115 pounds

Im 6’2 185 lbs I bought a large so that the sleeves would be long enough based off reviews But now im thinking I should have gone medium like I normally do because it’s too baggy and hangs weird on my hips. I washed it and lightly dried well and it didn’t shrink. The neck hole is too big and hangs weird and the material is nice and heavy yet thin? Hard to explain. It’s super soft. I really like it but I might have to tuck it in or layer it with a vest to hide the weird bottom part.

Very soft. Not thick thick, but has a degree of thickness that keeps you warm. I wore a tank top underneath. I’m 5’0 & 135lbs. The length is perfect and so arm the sleeves even though I’m on the shorter side. You can dress this long sleeve up or wear casual. I haven’t washed it yet. I wore it today with black slacks pants to work. This color matches easily with different colors. I will buy in other colors.

Love this sweater. It’s the perfect weight. Not super heavy. It’s really soft. I’m 5’3, and normally tops are very long and the sleeves are super long. This is a good length and the sleeves are perfect. If you are on the tall side you may find them too short. I ordered a S and it fits perfect. Loved it so much I ordered a second one in a different color.

Nice lightweight sweater. I ordered the xl as that’s my usual size, and it fits perfectly 5’4”, 190 lbs. soft and comfortable. I got the navy with plaid details and also the green with light green collar and cuffs. Would definitely order again.

Im 5'5 and 112lbs for reference. These are very cozy, haven't wore them outside yet but they feel like they will be very warm, nice and thick with the fleece lining, thicker than other brands I bought. They could be a little longer but they fit good, I got the extra small. They have a silky outer material and soft fuzzy inside. They come to just below my belly button which i like because im not a fan of high waisted clothes to begin with

These were warm, but the fit was weird. I ordered a small, they were tight & showed every bump & flaw on my legs & butt. So I ordered a medium. They were not tight, but still showed every bump & flaw. They are unflattering in both sizes on me. They pic of the brown is to show that the green pants overshare your skin texture compared to other lined tights. I have a 27 in waist, 36 in hips & a 31 in inseam. I returned them.

Super comfy but they were short on me. I'm 5 ft 9 and ordered an XL and they came up well above my ankles. So I'll have to wear tall socks with these which is fine but I really wanted them to be longer. The color was a LOT lighter than expected as well. I expected the darker slate blue color not a super light sky blue that I received.

The color is way off in the listing then the leggings actual color. It's true color is more of a baby blue then a dusty gray blue like shown. This is why I only gave four stars because it doesn't match description/listing. Otherwise these leggings are perfect! I was overly impressed with the quality. The inside and outside are both buttery soft and feel great on your skin. They are nice and warm without being overly thick or bulky. Fits true to size I weigh 129 lbs am 5ft 4 and the medium fit me great. Other then the color being off I have no complaints about these. For under 20 bucks these are a great buy!

These jeans have a flattering high waist and a true wide-leg cut that looks modern and stylish. The denim feels durable and the light blue wash matches the photos. They run a bit long (I’m 5’3”), so shorter people may need heels or hemming. No shrinkage after washing, but there’s no stretch, so choose your size carefully.

I spent the last three weeks in London, Paris, Florence, and Milan. The wide leg look is everywhere, on all ages of women and in many fabrics - but most of all in denim. I was excited to come home and find these YUCOLEN Wide Leg Denim Jeans waiting for me. They fit perfectly, which isn’t always the case for me with high waisted pants. YUCOLEN nailed the look I saw all over Europe. That includes the raw edge on the bottom in place of a hem. If the pants are too long just cut them off to the right length. The fabric is 65% cotton, which I love. The addition fiber mix is polyester, rayon, and spandex. The synthetic fibers give these jeans some stretch in the waist and seat, which is maybe why they fit me so well. For reference to the photos I am 5’4” and 135 lbs. I do not need to cut off the hems. The cotton synthetic fabric means these go through the washer and dryer without shrinking and best of all - they don’t need ironing. I was hoping I wouldn’t have to iron those wide legs every time I washed these jeans. Typical of other YUCOLEN pieces I own, the construction is well done. The seams are flat locked the front pocket has nice looking extra detailing. I may need to cut threads from the raw hem from time to time, but hey, that’s the look that in right now. The price is very reasonable for the quality of these pants. My step daughter asked me the brand as she wants to order a pair.

This review is for the YUCOLEN Women's Wide Leg Jeans Baggy High Waist Stretchy Jeans. At first I was a bit hesitant to order these jeans considering they had no reviews, they were from a brand I had never heard of and the images on the product detail page were not great. Let me ensure you these jeans exceeded expectations and are my new favorite pair of jeans. They look 10 x better in person than in the images. The images don’t justice to these jeans. Pros: -comfy -fit really great (122 lbs, 5’8”) -long enough to sit below my ankles while standing which is what I wanted for modesty reasons and because I personally don’t like jeans to sit above my ankles -mostly cotton making them breathable -I tried another pair of high waisted jeans from another brand and they made me really warm and sweatyyyy unfortunately I wanted to take them off the minute they went on. These are the opposite. They look and feel like jeans but their comfort and coolness is not like jeans which is amazing!! Cons: None. I am hopeful they will hold up in the wash. Let’s find out. If they end up not doing well over time I will come back and update my review. For now, I highly recommend these baggy high waisted women’s jeans. I received them so quickly and was pleased with the packaging, quality, use and affordability of the jeans.

I’m in love with these wide leg pants! They are long, and have plenty of stretch in the fabric. They fit nicely- do run a bit big as I am 185lbs and wear a 14/16- and these are a bit loose. But I think after washing and drying them and wearing a belt they will fit more snugly? The light blue wash/color looks fantastic! The leg cuffs are not hemmed. Very comfortable and stylish. Also they are long- I am “5’7” and I can wear platform sandals with them and they are still to my heel.

Yes, Exactly what I was looking for - these wide leg high waisted jeans have a fabric with just the right amount of stretch, so they hug at the waist without feeling restrictive, and looking flattering too! They flow into a loose fitting jean in the leg. These jeans make you look polished with that effortless flair! You can wear with sandals, sneakers, dress shoes and heels. The color is on trend with that medium blue color. So comfortable , I can wear all day, I wore on a hike/walk and then went to a really nice restaurant for brunch right afterwards. Highly recommend, I ordered medium and the fit was perfect, I am 5'7" and 145 pounds

Wow, what a great belt! I wear a size 14, 44 hip, 36 waist, 44 bust, 38F, 5'6 and 205 lb. I got the XL and it fits great, I might have even been able to size down but I wasn't going to chance it. I love this belt because it's definitely got the cowboy western vibe but could easily dress up any outfit, including a little black dress as shown in the image.

I got the 29 inch waist size, though i easily could have done 28. I am 5’3 and a half inches tall with short-ish legs. I weigh 128-130 lbs. This is the light brown which I find to be a perfect basic. My pair did not have any pink overtones though another customer found hers to have it. I love the color. The stretchy and almost silky softness is amazing!!! The weave looks like twill. I cannot wait to wear these to work and be professional but comfortable all day. I think I will crease my hems to make them a tad more cropped at the thinnest part of my ankle. In the photos, please bear in mind that my bum and tummy are most than 50 years old. Don’t blame the pants! On me, these are flattering and make my hips trim. Buy these and then enjoy your new pants!

I'm a 5' 4", true-to-curvy size 6, 28.5" waist, 29.5" inseam. The miduo size 29 fit very comfortably. The high waist was _almost_ right on me, though you can see it folding a little bit and I'd be inclined to wear these with a belt. The length isn't exactly cropped on me, more of an ankle pant, but I'm happy with that. They're more flattering in person than the photo.The material feels substantial, no worries about panty lines or bulges showing. I'd say these pants are suitable for business casual wear; they're crisply tailored with no visible seam faults. The 96% viscose, 4% elastane fabric seems like it will be comfortable in hot weather. They're definitely showing some packaging wrinkles - time will tell if they tolerate ironing or release wrinkles in the dryer.The khaki color does look slightly more greenish than the product image, again not a deal-breaker.

I almost never write reviews, but I’m so pleased with these pants, I just had to. I ordered size 32, I’m 5’9” and 179 lbs. when I was younger, I was much slimmer, and pants like these fit great. I wasn’t sure how I’d look in these, but I actually think they are flattering. (We still wanna look great at 55, right?) They have a substantial weight and dressy feel, with kind of a sheen. Very high-waisted, and a tad stretchy. They stretch slightly after wear, so I probably could have gone with a 31. Anyway, they made me feel like a million bucks at the opera. I’m super pleased with my purchase, and will be getting more colors!

I got these because I needed some work pants that were comfortable, but still business casual. They are super cute comfortable, I actually really like the high waist. I think it makes them very slimming. The only reason I’m giving this a four out of five stars is the material has definitely a little bit of a plastic polyester feel. It’s not bad and I’m keeping the pants, but would love these in linen or cotton. I am 5 4 and 130 pounds. I got size 26.
I really like the pants. They were comfy but really made for someone taller. I’m 5’2, 130lbs. The waist to beginning of the inseam was just too long.

Super comfortable and great stretch. Definitely a dupe for Maeve Colette pants. Only wish the butt pockets were slightly less far apart. Also I’m 5’4” with short legs and these are pretty cropped. Don’t know that I’d be a fan if I was taller.

Love these pants Textured linen look material. The fabric has stretch. I’m 5’6 weight 140-145 normally wear a 4-6. Ny waist is smaller and prefer high waisted pants. The waist is a little big but that is fine because if sized down would be too tight in high area. I got a 28 per size chart. The pants fit above ankle which is what I prefer. They are not too short to cut me off . I purchased navy for a nautical spring look and will wear with white canvas shoes or gladiator sandals. So pleased with purchase.
My new favorite teacher pants!!! They fit me so well and they are even kinda stretchy. Absolutely love the material. I am 5’4” and they are the perfect length. Not cropped.

I am 5’3 165 pounds, from the reviews in the size chart. It said I would need a large however I grabbed the medium, and that was still a little big. I could have gotten away with a small. The top is very beautiful and the material is good. The only problem I have is the line between the thick material, and the sheer material was uneven and done poorly. However, the rest of the shirt was made very nice.

Very comfortable fits true to size! I went w/a Small my normal size. I'm 5'4" 122 lbs, bust/bra 32DD-34D. It's snug as it should b at bust but not as much at waist & arms aren't tight, fit just right! Ruching at waist lets u adjust & hide. My only issue was it was too long on me/too much to tuck in, so I cut 4" off length used hem tape for quick fix after I washed in cold/delicate in lingerie bag/hung dry.

I love this top! The right mix of sexy and classy. It’s so soft and comfy! I’m 5’4, 135 lbs and usually wear a med - it’s true to size with a little extra room! Lightweight material but not itchy at all! It’s also washed well! Would buy in more colors! Great layering piece too!

Overall really great quality! Perfect for maternity (the small fits me at 7 months pregnant, 120 lbs) and will be great postpartum. There's one small area that isn't blended as well and the jeans have a slight smell even after washing, but overall I highly recommend! I'm 5'1 and the length is perfect, so these are great if you're petite.

I purchased these Metietila Womens Pull-on Jeans Stretch High Waisted Elastic Waist Jeans for Women Denim Joggers Pants in the light blue and size x-large. For reference I'm 5'5, 189lbs, typically wear a size large or 14/16 in jeans. I purchased the xl based on the waist measurement in their size chart. The sizing is probably accurate, but I should have stayed with my typical size of large for a better fit. These run long! The elastic waistband is much thicker/wider than the listing showed. These are super comfortable though. They are very soft-almost like an 80's acid-wash Jean. The color takes me back in time also-its nice to have an option for a very light blue. These have some stretch, but where they excellent is the comfort. I wanted to give five stars, but the length for me is way too long, which removes some if the 'style' of the jeans and the leg portion is a bit baggy.

I have gotten so many compliments on these jeans! They are very comfortable. Good quality material. Taper fit, not tight. Belly friendly! Drawstring waist. I am “5’7” 183 lbs. I am thick in my belly area and backside. I got an XL. and like them a lot. Deep pockets!
As pictured, comfortable, easy to wear. One star removed for running small. 31" waist and ordered a medium. Would probably have been happy with a large.

These are pretty jeans that are elasticated and very comfortable to wear. They are high waisted with wide legs. The sizing is true,I ordered 10 which is my usual size. I love the fit and the look but I'm short at 5ft4 and these are down to my feet rather than ankle length on me. The colour looks smart and they are great quality. The zip and stitching are good too. They are easy to pair with different types of tops, jumpers and shoes.

A bit long. Got these for my wife and she loves them, especially the red color. Excellent material...thick but stretchy...will definitely last. Pictures show them tucked under and not. Embroidery is too cool and well done. Look great with her boots. 2nd Flamingals pants I've purchased for her...she had to hem the other pair because they also ran long, but were also Excellent material. She's 5'4", 115lbs. Small fit perfectly.

I LOVE these jeans! I rarely am able to order jeans online and have them fit, but these were PERFECT right out of the bag. I'm 5'6" 135lbs and ordered the medium. I probably could've went with the small, but I hate skin tight jeans (even with the stretch) and I'm anticipating these might shrink a little after washing. The pocket size and placement is flattering, even with a pancake tush like mine. The denim is comfortable and soft and the embroidery stitching is the quality you see in much more expensive jeans. For $50, I thought these were a steal and have come back to order another pair. I do feel they are a little long; I definitely would not be able to wear them without a boot heel, unless I hemmed them.

Love these jeans! They are very comfortable and so soft like suede. They have a vintage, faded look. The color is so pretty…not too purple or pink. The embroidery design is very detailed and great quality. I would say the pockets are similar to other high quality jeans. I am 5’ 4” and the length is perfect. They are not very stretchy like most jeans nowadays. I believe the quality of these jeans are worth the price although I haven’t washed them yet. I will follow the washing instructions. I hope there is no shrinkage, discoloration or the embroidery doesn’t fall apart. If so, I will be revising my review. I did have to return for one size smaller even though I followed the size requirements but received the replacement within a few days. Highly recommend these beautiful jeans.

I purchased the tan color in size small. The color and embroidery are very nice and the slacks look just like the pictures. The size fits right, as well. My main complaint is the length. I'm 5'4", that's average height, but the length is for someone 5'10". I'll now need to go and get them professionally hemmed, which will cost even more money, especially since these jeans are expensive to begin with.

Love these jeans, makes me feel nostalgic for my teen years, Wore them for the first time today got lots of compliments . would love to find them in capri length too. Size medium, I’m 5’3” and 152 lbs

I really like these jeans, but they are too big in the thighs. I am 5'2" and weigh about 105 lbs. My hips are 35" and my waist about 30". I am 66, so I have a thicker waist. I usually wear about a size 4 or 6. I ordered a small in these, which was the recommended size. The waist and hips fit nicely, but the baggy thighs don't look good. They are about 2" too long, but I am use to having to hem up pants. They are high waisted, which I also like. They came up to my bell button. I am sending these back and will try the xs, but they will probably be too tight in the waist. I hope this review helps. Also, the embroidery is only on one leg.

The is a cute sleevless top. The color is a nice khaki color and looks as like the picture. It's made well with no seams or threads sticking out anywhere. Fabric is soft and is stretchy which is very nice. It is a fitted slim tan top and feels nice against the skin. I bought the black one as well. I'm 5'2, 139 for reference. I normally wear a large or extra large for an oversized fit. I didn't want it to fit tight. It's a lose fit enough for me. The material is a heavier material, stretches enough to hug the body, and is soft on the skin. Pairs well with jeans or you can dress it up as well.

The quality of this shirt is very good quality for the price. The ribbed material is thick, stretchy and not see through at all. I got the XL because i wanted it to not be skin tight, well this shirt runs a bit small and is very form fitting. For reference I am 5'6", 205 lbs, Size 12/14. I prefer just a slightly looser fit then this but the color is great and the style is nice, just wish it was a tad looser worried it will shrink after washing and then it will be to tight.

As cute in person as pictured. I ordered two of these: Black size small Retro blue size medium The differences in sizes was minimal, but the medium was on the baggier side. I am 5'5"/125 with a short waist and long legs. I wear a size 4 most of the time, but not after pizza or pasta! This hit about 4" above my ankles in both sizes. But it has adjustable overall straps so you can customize to your own specifications. I washed both before wearing as there was a slight chemical smell, especially the black one. The black one had a couple of super lose rivet buttons that I did not think it would survive the wash, but they did. If any of them come off, It is pretty easy to replace them with new ones, just look for "bachelor buttons" here on Amazon. That's why I took off a star. I took pictures of both using a tape measure for reference. I wore the blue one to Bible Study and the grocery store after and got compliments on my cute dress. I love how loose and non-threatening these are and easy to style.

I love this jumper so much!!! I almost didn’t buy it because there were very few girls my size modeling it. So I wanna leave this review so people can see what a person in size 6 looks like in a small. About 128 lbs. 5’6”. One of my favorite Amazon purchases ever. And I’ve purchased a lot! Haha! 🤣

This denim overall dress did not disappoint. It is good quality denim fabric and the XL fits me perfectly. I usually wear a size 14. I'm 5'11" and the hem falls about 6" above the ankle, which is good. The strap hardware does seem a little cheap, and I hope it doesn't break. I will be careful washing the dress in cold water and hanging dry to avoid stressing the hardware and preventing shrinkage. There is no odor to the fabric. It's super cute and fun to wear. Happy with this purchase.

I have a skirt I love from this same brand, so I thought I'd try the overall dress. I was NOT disappointed!!! I am 5 ft 6 in, and it's midi length for me. I got the Retro Blue shade, and it's a neutral denim color. The material seems to be long lasting. It's SOOO comfortable and I wear it all the time. The only problem is the slit. The photos didn't show a slit, but when I received it, the slit goes up pretty high, to just above the knee in the back. This overall dress is a staple!!!

This is not my first time wearing overalls in the span of my lifetime but definitely my first time wearing a pinafore version. Given I'm 5'2.5", a few pounds over my typical 145, and busty, I tried on the size "L" as recommended but didn't like the drape on my frame. I was pleasantly surprised when I tried on the "M" and although a bit more snug than I'd like after washing it, drying it on low until damp, and wearing it on an excursion, it stretched a little and was quite comfortable. I love the the black and am considering adding a blue version to my wardrobe.

Purchased XXL and XL . XL fits well- closer to the body, but the XXL is loose and comfortable. I dislike anything I can feel around my waist. Dress appeals to the hippie in me.I am 5'7" 200-ish Lbs. 41" waist, 41" across chest, 48" hips. The XXL measure roughly 46" waist, 52"hips 43" top of bib to hem. The fabric is nice, not heavy but still substantial. Did have a slight chemical smell but I think it was from the plastic bag it came in. It aired out and was fine. Washes well-hang to dry-so the straps are not wonky. I embroidered all over mine. Copied a picture granddaughter drew of me when she was 4 ish and us standing together. Came out super cute. Highly recommend purchase.

I love this dress. I got a size L and I think that was the right choice. I think it will still look cute even if I lose weight. For reference I'm 5'2 and 175 lbs. The length on me goes to my ankles, not the floor which I'm pretty happy about. It has usable pockets that are deep enough so if I put my phone or debit card in they won't fall out if I lean over. I do have to unbutton the sides when I put it on and then button them again. It isn't hard but this is real denim and doesn't have stretch to it. The nice thing about those is that the dress will last a long time. The top front pocket world good stuff as well but I didn't put anything in it. I wore me sweater under the straps but you could wear a cardigan or sweater over just as easily. The overall dress can be layered in winter or worn with a light tee in summer. Very cute and durable item, it could be a staple piece.

Delivery was on time. It’s a soft feeling fabric. Color is what I expected. I’m 5’8” and 180, I have a tummy and this fits nicely, XL. I could possibly get by with a Lrg. But think the tummy and arms would be tight.

The turquoise top came without cuff buttons on one side. Unfortunately, I found this after washing. It is a polyester top, and it feels like polyester too. That usually means if you live in a dry climate, you will get zapped with static, and so will your electronic devices.I bought an XL. Most my tops are XL. I wear a size 12 to 14 dress, 41 bust measurement, 5’5 tall, 172 and this top fits very well. It is tunic length in the front, which hangs to the crotch, with a slight rise on the sides. If you have larger arms, this is a perfect fit for you. Lots of room.The other was a turquoise and brown top. It feels slightly smaller than the other, and has no defects. They both look nice and fit well. I will be tightening the cuffs, and shorting the length, so they look better with the popular high rise, loose legged jeans. These would go well tucked in, or with leggings, if you still wear them. The material is gathered at the shoulder, which gives it a nice fitted look. The V-neck is not too deep/low, which I like.Be sure to inspect for defects upon arrival.

For reference I am 5'6 and 135 - size small. Fun red with button details on sleeves. This can easily be worn for work of casual, pair with a scarf and boots = super cute. The fabric is soft to the touch with and a great weight. I would wash in cold and hang dry to maintain its color quality.

The shirt arrived vacuum sealed in a bag. The fabric is soft and a nice weight for summer. I have not washed the shirt yet, so I cannot say how well it washes or holds up, but the label says 95% polyester/ 5% spandex, so I am guessing it will wash well. The pattern was actually prettier in person, and was not quite as green as it looked in the seller's pictures. I liked that the shirt is 3/4 sleeve, as I do not like my upper arms exposed, but I did think the sleeves were a couple inches too long on me. To be fair though, I am only 5'2". I would have liked the sleeve opening to be a little smaller. I think it would have given the shirt a bit more shape in the arms, and it would have allowed me to push the sleeves up to my elbows. For reference, my bust measurement is 47.5" and waist is 44", so I would say the 3x approximately equivalent to a traditionally sized women's 22/24. For reference, my bust measurement is 47.5" and waist is 44". Pricewise, I do think the full price of 24.99 is a touch high, so maybe wait and catch it on sale. Overall it is a cute shirt, and it is comfortable. If the sleeve cuffs were a little tighter, I would have given it 5 stars.

I absolutely love these pants! They have become very important in my wardrobe for cold days. These were the pants I chose to wear to my partner's family Christmas and I got SO MANY COMPLIMENTS. The stretch means they'll work for a variety of body shapes. They're high waisted and VERY flattering. They make my waist look super small, but are roomy in the bum and thighs. I got them in Medium and I'm 5'5. Now, when I first got them, I was about 145-150lbs and they fit perfect. I've lost weight and am now 130-135, and they are visibly baggy. They remain incredibly comfortable, but I would say consider going with the smaller size if you are between sizes. The stretch is very accommodating.

These fleece-lined pants are super comfortable and stretchy -- they're 25% spandex! They look form-fitting on the product page so I ordered a couple of sizes up. Other than being a bit too long, they're perfect for how I like my pants to fit. They're nicely cut with a front yoke and 5 pockets: 2 in front, 2 in back, and a perfectly sized phone pocket on the side of the leg. They're a nice shiny deep black with a soft fleece lining (even though they appear grey in one of my photos, I lightened it to make the pockets show up more clearly). The elastic waist has belt loops so I can wear them as slip-ons or use the zippered fly. They're well made and the fabric is high quality, so they're worth the slightly high price. My only reservation is that polyester tends to pill so I don't know how well they'll hold up over time. The tag says to machine wash them at 30C or less on delicate, then tumble dry on low or hang them to dry. I hang-dry most of my polyester clothes to avoid pilling.

Perfectly Petite! I’m 5’3 and they sit at the top of my foot. I was expecting a slimmer thigh, fit but these are roomy. I think you can size down if you’d like. The maroon color is as expected. The fleece lining is so snuggly! If I order again I’ll try sizing down to see if I like the fit better.

I got these fleece lined pants for my sister (5'9", 130 lbs, size Medium in Navy Blue) and they fit her really well. The stretchiness is one of the best features — they have a lot of give without feeling too loose or sloppy, so they’re comfortable for everyday wear. The five pockets are surprisingly practical: two in the front, two in the back, and an extra cellphone pocket on the left hip, which is really handy. The elastic band in the back does give them a bit of an "old lady pants" feel at first glance, but honestly, once they’re on, they look fine and the fit is really flattering. She was even surprised that the medium fit her comfortably since pants like this are usually too snug & short — but these are VERY stretchy, so they fit perfectly. The fleece lining is warm without being bulky, which makes them great for cooler weather. Overall, these pants are stylish, functional, and comfortable. Definitely a solid choice if you want something cozy with good stretch and real pockets!!!

Yay, finally some pants that fit, look good, and feel good! I wasn’t sure what to expect when I ordered these so I was pleasantly surprised to find these slacks that feel like pajamas! They have nice belt loops, pockets, fit me perfectly in my usual XL size- even the length is good, not too long! (I’m 5’4”, 177 lbs) What more could you ask for? It’s a shame they cost so much but I’d say they’re nearly worth it so far ($40 at the moment).

I Love these shorts! I like the length, the style and the quality! For reference, I am 5’4”, 135 lbs, waist is 34” and hips are 38, ordered a size Medium. The rolled up, frayed, hem is actually STITCHED up, so the won’t ever roll down!♥️ They have a lot of stretch in them, which I don’t need the benefit of, and wide leg openings. I probably could have gotten a size small, the stretch in the denim might then have gotten some use and they would have been snug in the waist. Overall, they are soooo comfortable!!

I’m OBSESSED with these shorts. I first saw them on TikTok and had to try them. Got light blue and love how they fit my curves. I’m 5’0”, 146 lbs and have those in Large. I wear them so much, I ordered another pair in gray from Amazon. This large is SO MUCH BIGGER. Decided to get a medium just to compare, but they’re too tight and super short so I returned them. I don’t think sizing is very consistent, even amongst the same color and style. Luckily returns are easier here than on TikTok shop where you have to pay shipping…. I don’t mind my shorts being loose, so large it is. The only issue is the butt…. It looks so saggy and frumpy. The fabric is soft and stretches a lot, so by the end of the day they look baggy, but the waist still fits fine. The graining is beautiful and it’s a nice shade of gray. I don’t normally like fringed but it looks pretty cool. Highly recommend these if you have bigger thighs, hips, or curves in general! Try a size up if you like them loose.

Ok I never post pics and honestly these pics do these shorts not justice! I'm 5'7" and 158lbs. I ordered a large and the fit PERFECTLY!! Great price too! I didn't want them skin tight as I'm not a teenie bopper. Mid 30s here. I like my shorts a little tight. BUt not falling off. Tight enough that my booty looks nice but not cutting off my thighs. I have not washed them yet. This is straight out of package pics. They are super soft and have stretch to them so a big BBQ party with beers or an all you can eat buffet won't cut my air supply off. Not to mention yuck week will be a breeze in these. I feel like I'll be able to dress them up or down. Order them! Good quality! If you like them tight order down. A med. Would have fit me great prob tight. I wanted comfy and lady like.

Based off other reviews, I ordered an XL and they're a bit big. I'm 5'3" and weigh174lbs. They are comfortable and the material quality seems good. The reason I'm rating 4 star is because of the awful smell when I opened the package.
Love these shorts so much. They are super comfortable and have just the right amount of give to them. Highly recommend!I’m 5’4”, 117 lbs, ordered the small. Perfect fit!

My absolute favorite top! Very flattering and comfortable. I just ordered 3 more different colors! It runs small so consider sizing up. For reference, I'm 5'2 and 125lbs and wearing a Small (pictured). It is a little tight so I ordered the next 3 in medium. Place your order, you won't be disappointed!

Very very very cute top. Stretchy and so flattering. I got the pink color in a size L. I’m 5’3” 155lbs. I’m 6 weeks post partum and this shirt makes me feel beautiful. Works for nursing too because of the stretch.

If I could leave more than 5 starts I absolutely would! I am 5'0 and 118 pounds, I ordered a size XS for reference. It fit me like a GLOVE. The back zips up and is a little tricky to get on. My recommendation is to turn it backwards and start the zipper up some, then spin it back around and put your arms in and you're able to pull it up the rest of the way. The quality of this shirt is surprisingly very good for the price. I ordered this in black, and light was. I will be back for more! It is true to size but I have a smaller chest. If you have a larger chest I would size up.

This is a beautiful sweater. I love the way the sleeves fit at the shoulders and at the wrist. It is very comfortable and soft, and the button details paired with the color block makes it look very unique. This sweater can be dressed up with a pair of slacks and boots, or dressed down with a pair of jeans. It is not too thick, and can be worn tucked in or just worn out as it hangs very elegantly around the hips. I got an XXL for reference with the pictures. I'm 5'3, 170 lbs. Very nice top!

I picked up this lounge set in XL (I’m a solid size 16) and had high hopes - and for the most part, it delivered! The pants are fabulous: stretchy in all the right places, drawstring waist, and just the right length for my 5'6" frame. It has that relaxed-but-put-together look I love for fall. Now, the top is where things get a little confusing. The material is thicker than expected (yay for chilly mornings!), but it’s much more fitted than your typical "lounging-around" top. I’m a C-cup and it’s definitely snug in the chest. It’s not uncomfortable or unwearable - it actually looks pretty chic tucked in - but if you’re expecting that oversized Sunday-morning vibe, this isn’t it. Overall: great set for looking pulled together at home, or for running errands in comfort and style. Just be ready for a top that’s more cute brunch than Netflix and flop.

When I first took this out of the package I was excited to try it on, because I think it looked cute. After getting it on however, I changed my mind about liking it. The waist is too big so to make it fit, I had to pull it down further on my hips. Normally I am o.k. with doing this to get a skirt a better fit, but because of the ruffle design, it makes my hips look bigger than they are. I recommend sizing down on this skirt if you want to buy it. For reference, I am 5'2" and 115 pounds and I ordered this in a small. As far as the construction on this, it's not bad. There were a few loose threads, which I trimmed off. The stitching feels like it's tight, so I don't expect the seams to split. I washed it in hot water and put it in the dryer on high heat in hopes of shrinking it a bit, which it did. There was about 1.5" shrinkage in the waist, but within an hour it had stretched out to the original size plus a bit more. It also had a few wrinkles after coming out of the dryer, so it needed to be ironed before wearing (I hate wearing wrinkled clothing, it's one of my idiocies). If there wasn't an issue with the sizing, this skirt would be a 5-star skirt. I think it would look really cute with a concho belt and some cowgirl boots, but because of the sizing issue I am knocking 1 star off.

For reference, I am 5’8”160 pounds and wearing a medium. There is no stretch to the material so it is regular denim. I usually wear like a size 10 sometimes a 12 in clothing and the medium fits me fine. Material is good and thick and zipper seems good. Definitely cute to dress it up with some boots and jacket 😊

This skirt is very well made and really cute. The length is perfect for me since I’m only 5’1”. I love that it’s very high-waisted, which makes it easier to style and more flattering overall. I tried it on after gaining a few pounds and my usual size still fit, though it does feel a bit snug at the waist and accentuates my belly more than I’d prefer right now. I also have wider hips, so the skirt does make them look a bit wider (which I expected) but it’s something to keep in mind when ordering. For reference, I ordered a size Medium and usually wear size 8/29 in jeans. I currently weigh about 155 lbs (I was around 148 lbs a couple of weeks ago). I plan to lose the extra weight and expect this skirt will be perfect for spring and summer, though it would also look cute in the fall paired with boots. The material is thin and soft but still looks and feels like denim. It arrives with tags attached, making it suitable for gifting as well.

I like this skirt even more than I thought I would. The top tier fits well and is comfortable and flattering. The length is decent too, but I'm on the short side (5'2" and 115lbs). I'm happy with the dark blue color and feel like it will go with more tops. It looks especially nice with boots. I do think it's overpriced at $43 and can't imagine spending $60 on it.

I’m 5’2 and 120lbs. I ordered this in size small and it’s perfect. It comes vacuum packed so expect wrinkles but there are instructions on getting it smoothed out - put on a hanger and let sit in the sun. I actually just put it in the dryer for 3 minutes and it came out fine. The fabric is light enough to wear on a warm day.
I bought the XS for my lanky 11 year old daughter for a Rosie the Riveter costume . She is around 4’10 and 75 pounds. Fit excellent with the sleeves cuffed up

These cutoff denim shorts are a great find. I ordered them for my daughter to wear on an upcoming beach trip and they turned out really cute. For reference, she is 5'4", weighs about 125 pounds, and normally wears a size Small. Because she prefers not to wear clothing that is too tight or revealing, I ordered a Medium instead of her usual size. That turned out to be a good choice because the shorts do seem to run a bit small. The Medium gives her a comfortable fit without looking overly snug. The navy blue color has the perfect faded, worn-denim appearance that looks very natural. The fabric resembles real denim but is softer and has a good amount of stretch, which makes them comfortable for all-day wear. The distressed tears add a trendy look without being excessive. Overall, these are stylish, comfortable shorts and a great value for the price. They’ll be a nice addition to her summer wardrobe and beach trip outfits.

I am happy with these Jean shorts. They are very comfortable. The material is stretchy, even the waistband. I like the button enclosure and the button hole is lined up right and it’s not too big. The zipper lays flat so the fly doesn’t bulge. The pockets tuck all the way in and don’t ride up. They are pretty flattering I think. The ripped details are not too extreme, just a few frayed areas, nothing that is a complete bare hole. I took off one star because the cut off is a bit disappointing. The length is fine but it looks like someone just cut the shorts with scissors and sent them off to the buyer. I’m hoping that washing will soften the edges so they don’t look so freshly cut. I ordered a size L. They are snug but comfortable. I’m 5’3, 170lbs. I would recommend these jeans shorts.

I have been looking for cute, comfortable and affordable shorts for spring and summer. When I saw these ANRABESS Womens Ripped Denim Shorts, I immediately ordered them in the (Navy Blue B, Medium) version. I LIKE THEM A LOT! They fit me well. For reference, I am 5'5ish, 165ish pounds, 34D bust and 28" waist.
