This Dress Is Everything And Pockets💖 I Purchased This Dress For A Wedding Absolutely LoVe The Dress. I Got The XL Size Because I'm 6'0 and 190 lbs. I Wish The Sleeves Had Elastic That Way It Would Stay In Place And Not Slide Down Showing The Cuff Anyways With That Being Said It's Still A Five Star Dress

Lovely but lays weird at my neck like I want to love this dress so much! I think the quality is excellent, the fabric is heavy enough to be draped. The pockets are perfectly placed and the length on me is great for wearing with my wedge sandals now or later in the fall/winter with boots. My only complaint is the neckline is weird. I think it has to do with the rooshing Around the front of the sleeves. The sleeves are not gathered, . It’s the body of the dress where it attaches to the sleeves and that seems to push The shoulder seams back off the natural should line just a little bit, causing the scoop in the back to be lower than the scoop in the front. I keep trying to pull it forward and it stays for a minute, but then tends to go back again. I got this from an influencer’s daily post, and paid under $20 for it, so I’ll probably keep it for travel. I think it will easily roll up in a suitcase and with the scarf. I probably won’t notice how the neckline lays so much. I’ve even thought maybe it was intentionally made that way, but it’s not that low, to be like a ballet neck where the back is intentionally lower than the front . Otherwise, a great dress I’m 63 years old, 5 foot five, 145 pounds and a size small fit grade.

Honestly, she was the showstopper of the night at $50 in a room full of four and five and $600 dresses. They purchased it in two colors just in case and know that she can be where it at formal or dressy occasions. I would totally buy this dress again and look to Amazon for more dresses in the future. She was able to dance, sit, squat, and was fine wearing flats and it all evening. Believe the photos. This dress is the bomb.

Ripped My daughter wore this to the Taylor Swift event and within five minutes of having it on (with a cheapy zipper that was wonky ) her strap totally popped. You can’t tell in the photo bc i stealthily safety pinned it, and sent her with more in case anything else snapped. She’s 5’7 117 and no we did not squeeze her Step sister style into it either. (She’s on the left)

Nice dress for a social event such as wedding. You can dress it up with accessories or jewelry if needed. I am 5’4, size 12, and ordered a Large which fit well. Agree with prior reviews recommending wearing a slip with this dress as the fabric is thin. Also it is wrinkled upon arrival but I used a steamer and it worked fine. Not the highest quality material so my five star rating is based on look + value at this price point. Would recommend and buy again.

Beautiful dress – arrived used and smelling strongly of perfume. Disappointing. Note: I am 5’ 5 1/2”, 170 pounds, and a size 14 was perfect. This sizing might be a bit loose for some people but I want to be able to move, dance, and feel comfortable at an event. I would have given this FIVE stars. I have to knock off two stars because it smells - STRONGLY. This dress is gorgeous and would be perfect for my event, but: As soon as I opened it I thought, “Wow, it smells really good!“ I thought maybe they use some kind of strong chemical-y scent in the shipping department to make everything smell fresh and delicious. I thought perhaps even the delivery driver’s truck was heavily scented with some kind of car scent thingy. I tried on the dress – it’s beautiful. It’s near perfect. And then I noticed that the smell was REALLY beautiful. Like a woman’s perfume. I smelled the armpits and yes, this has been worn before, and probably more than a few minutes. 1. If people are going to return stuff they’ve tried on, PLEASE wear unscented deodorant - and no perfume. 2. If people are gonna wear stuff to an event, you really shouldn’t return it. That’s not fair to other people. I started to suspect that this had been worn out of someone’s house because it doesn’t have tags. This is not what I would call “new.“ It’s a beautiful dress. I will be ordering another one - IDENTICAL to this one, but I want the dress I receive to be new because I’m wearing it to a family member’s wedding. Beautiful dress – incredibly flattering. I’m busty. And have quite a bit of padding around the waist, and I still look good in it. I plan to pair it with silver, strappy open-toe heels and a silver clutch. It’s a very fresh looking dress. And would be lovely in early spring when it's still cool, but it’s the fabric weight is suitable for the fall, I feel. It’s well-made, but they sent me a used one.

BUY NOW!!! Ok, this is a long, somewhat in depth review for the dress and five different colors. We are renewing our vows for our 25th and I want something that isn't wedding dressy, something that I know I'll wear again. I'll provide size info and then my opinion on the dresses themselves. I didn't wear anything under the dresses because I didn't have to and I wanted to see what they'd look like without. And omg, you don't NEED anything under this dress because it will give you the shape of a goddess! Also, I only order with Prime because Amazon is just too much of a gamble to not have that free return guarantee. My stats are: 5'4", roughly 132+/- depending on what I nom nom nom on, 34-25-35, size small/4, and my current bras are 36 DDD. They don't match my measurements but it is the bra size that fits me. Idk, my ladies are large-large and every piece of clothing that I own that covers them is stretch fabric so they fit! This is THE dress, gorgeous, versatile, and makes you look like you exercise more and eat less. So far I have ordered the beige, red, black, royal blue, and both wine colors. All colors were in a small, all had the same thick fabric and nothing showed through any of them. I did not have a gapping issue with the bust as some women have (but that's due to the girls' size). I didn't take pictures of all the dresses because I forgot to. The beige, red, and black all came in a plastic bag with a zipper that was clearly labeled with the sizes, the manufacturer, and the color, tissue paper wrapping the dresses, and a piece of foam wrapper around the top of the zippers so they wouldn't create an indent in the fabric. The royal blue and both wines were in a plastic bag that had to be torn or cut open, did not have any identifying stickers on the bag, and did not have any sort of protective tissue paper or anything over the zippers. None of the dresses had a book at the top and they do need one so plan on that super easy, super fast fix. Only the black dress had hanging ribbons sewn onto the dress, this was missing on all other dresses. I think it would make it somewhat difficult to hang the dress without those ribbons since the halter would stretch out and using a hanger with clips on the top will eventually create a permanent indent in the fabric. I guess they could be folded? But who does that with a dress? Anyway, moving on... The beige leaned towards pink. The red is an orange-red and not a true red or a red with blue undertones. The black is a true, deep black. The royal blue is a gorgeous, saturated blue that looked exactly as advertised. Although my pictures don't reflect it due to poor lighting and camera skills both wine colors are *exactly* the same shade and fabric content. The beige, red, black, and one of the wine colors all fit the same and as I expected a body con dress in a heavy stretch fabric should. The royal blue and one of the wine dresses were tighter, the royal blue to the point where I thought it might be an XS but there is no identifying size anywhere. I could get it on and zipped but it was noticably smaller. These are very much like tight wiggle dresses from the 50's in that you need to take very short, ladylike strides (which can be super sexy). All the dresses came to mid-calf on me and the short ruffle hem is a fantastic addition that gives the dress a lot of personality and flirtiness. I'm not sure what the difference is, but I question if all of these dresses were made by the same manufacturer due to the differences in packaging, the care taken with the packing, the way the dresses fit, and which dresses were consistent in size compared to those that weren't. Maybe it's just my snobby imagination but the dresses that were packed better all seem slightly superior. They were most definitely the most consistent of the seven I ordered. So far the black is winning. The red is just not the right color for my pale skin, there's something about the wine dresses that I'm not loving, the beige is all right but kind of expected, and I would be keeping the blue if it had been one of the better packed dresses that were consistent in size. I have time so I'm considering ordering another small to see if it's any different than the one sitting on my kitchen table waiting to be returned. I had ordered other bandages dresses from this company, and while they were also fantastic, this one gives the silhouette I'm looking for: classy while also being sexy, flirty, and ever so slightly suggestive because the shape this gives you in AH-MAH-ZINGGG!!! I don't think you can go wrong ordering any of the dresses from Meilun, some are just better than others. I order a lot on Amazon and these are easily some of the absolute best clothing items I've purchased!

Needed adjustments but good product Overall this was an amazing dress, came in later than expected but still on time thankfully. Went to prom with it and got told by a lot of people that it was a very pretty dress. Was kinda worried cause I've seen very few lighter women wearing this dress, but it came out great. The reason it's getting a 4 instead of a five is because there were a few small things. For one the big poofy sleeves are huge, like way bigger than the pictures made them look and they are very tight and uncomfortable. For two the wiring in the bra is really pointy and makes the boobs look awkward. When those are taken out, the dress looks a lot better. I was also worried the dress was going to be very short, due to my height of nearly 6 foot in heels. However, it was way longer than I thought. So long that I couldn't walk in it and we ended up cutting it shorter. Overall though it's an amazing dress. Very pretty for the price.

Perfect fit! ....and needs to be hemmed. Really enjoyed wearing this dress! I'm 5'8", 225lbs. I purchased a 3x. WARNING it's meant to be hemmed to the proper length. Therefore, It was probably about five inches too long to be worn as is. Otherwise, I was delighted!

Very nice dress! So I would probably give this dress a five star if it had pockets. I am normally a 16-18 clothing and I ordered an 18 plus. I am about 5’2” and this dress will need slightly hemmed but honestly the fit is almost perfect that I could probably wear it as is but I don’t want to trip at my son’s wedding. The color is as described. The dress is made well and I love the ease of taking it off and on without the fuss of a zipper or weird padding that doesn’t work for larger chested women. I was feel bummed because I have tried on so many dresses and didn’t think I would find one I actually liked until this one arrived. Can’t wait to see how it all comes together with shoes and accessories.

Decent for the price The design elements of this dress are great. The faux wrap of the skirt with draping conceals the mid-section well. The quality could definitely be better. The bust is tighter than expected. The dress is only partially lined which makes it feel cheaply done. The bust is lined and the skirt is lined about half way down, so the midsection and mid thigh down are unlined. I don’t think it would be as obvious in a darker color, but the partial lining really takes away from the quality of the dress. I otherwise would have given this dress five stars. I am happy with the fit and the dress is comfortable. The zipper seems low quality also, but it hasn’t given me issues as of yet. This item runs smaller than the sizing recommendations. I ordered a Large plus and my measurements are 36 bust, 30-31 waist and I typically wear a size 10. I’m 5”3 and the dress falls mid calf. Overall, I like the dress for its design and comfort, but sizing runs small and the quality needs improvement. Hope this helps!

Mermaid Dress For A Formal Event One Shoulder Sewing Done To Fit Right! The dress arrived in a simple bag...the maker really should give it a box and wrapping it's so nice! I ordered an XL, I am 5'6", 140 lbs, chest measurement 40 inches and Ooolala this dress is a dream. At first I just took one bra strap down then I went without. They sewed the dress correctly for my shape. It looks like it was sewn for me! The top actually is supportive enough no bra didn't matter. The lining is nice and you can see it is just beautiful in the sun. The colors are iridescent and shift back and forth. I'm blown away and I'm bougie ladies. Five Stars aren't enough...and the price is really low for this gown. I was wiggling around admiring myself in the sliding glass doors and the yard guys came to look...lets just say I got all thumbs up. :0)

GRACE KARIN Women Sleeveless Sequin Dress Wine 6 - CLASSY dress :) There's a wedding looming in my near future and this dress is a heavy favorite. The wine color is very classy. Just stunning in person. For reference, I am 5ft 1in, 110lbs, 35 bust, 26 waist, 36 hip. I normally wear a size extra small to a small. The wine in size 6 was perfect for me. The fit: The dress itself hugs your body but doesn't cling! It just glides over your curves thanks to the soft inner lining. Quality: Grace Karin clothing has never disappointed me in quality and this dress keeps that standard well. Misc: This dress is fancy without being stuffy, sexy without being gauche or crude. Bottom Line: LOVE it! Five stars!

Beautiful Dress This dress is beautiful. There are a few reasons why I couldn’t give this a five star review, but I do recommend the dress. I’m a tall woman and it was much shorter than I anticipated. If you are over 5 feet 10 inches, this will be short (I am 6 feet tall). Also, I was very self conscious of how much cleavage was visible. I did purchase a separate shawl that helped, though. Just keep that in mind if you have a larger chest. Otherwise, the dress was comfortable and fit well.

Absolutely beautiful!! So much better than I expected. :) This dress is so pretty!! It looks much better in person. I am five feet and 200 lbs and ordered a 3X and it fits perfectly. You will definitely not be disappointed if you order this dress. Also it is pretty see through so you will definitely need a slip or petticoat underneath. This picture is what it looks like right out of the package. I love it!!

GORGEOUs! Sexy but classy! This dress was simply beautiful! I was absolutely shocked for the price how nice it really turned out to be! I am 5”4, 128lbs and got a small it fit perfect! I got tons of compliments and my NYE date was stunned 😉! I probably could have gotten away with an XS for a tighter fit but it is a very nicely made dress with only a bit of stretch so a small was perfect. Stick to your usual size since the back is zip up! It’s very sexy with the slits and sheer top to it, but still elegant and really flattering! Lol just make sure you have a nice black push up bra or little cami for underneath and you are ready to go! Five stars Best dress buy yet on Amazon and I buy half my clothes on here lol if your doubting getting it, GET IT!

Comfortable enough fabric but the chest button sits a little weird and skirt is way too long. This HDLTE long dress is made of a fabric that's comfortable enough for my sensitive skin. Other things I like about this dress: -- The purple color is dark and deep. -- The skirt has a nice flow to it. -- the long sleeves are comfortable. -- The fabric has some stretch to it. Things I don't like about this dress: -- I don't like the wrinkly elastic in the back. It cheapens the look. -- The waist sits a little too high in the front. -- Another thing about the waist is that it rides wayyy up with my movements and I have to keep adjusting it. -- The skirt is laughably too long. I'm 5'5" and this skirt is just too long. Please make long skirts just a hint shorter for us shorter girls. Sorry I couldn't get a pic of the full length with my bathroom counter in the way. -- The snap button on the chest sits weird and does a small peekaboo thing that I hate. Also, I don't know how well the snap button will hold up if someone prefers to wear tighter dresses across the chest. The v-neck sinks too low on me as well. So, even though this dress is comfortable to wear against my skin, it has more bad qualities than good for me, unfortunately. If those quirks were fixed, this would be a five star because it is a nice faux wrap design.

I'm 5'5" and this skirt is just too long. Please make long skirts just a hint shorter for us shorter girls. Sorry I couldn't get a pic of the full length with my bathroom counter in the way. -- The snap button on the chest sits weird and does a small peekaboo thing that I hate. Also, I don't know how well the snap button will hold up if someone prefers to wear tighter dresses across the chest. The v-neck sinks too low on me as well. So, even though this dress is comfortable to wear against my skin, it has more bad qualities than good for me, unfortunately. If those quirks were fixed, this would be a five star because it is a nice faux wrap design.

Elegant and simple This is a fit and flare style dress that will look elegant for any formal occasion while still keeping a very traditional, conservative look to the dress. If you are someone who doesn’t like formal dresses that have cleavage or openings that show legs or backs then this is the dress for you. The fit part of the dress is at the top covering the chest, and includes sequin and sparkly things that show off the top of the dress. There is also a see-through sleeve area that offers a formal look while still providing that more traditional coverage. The bottom part is more of a chiffon and a flares out which provides coverage for areas that people are usually more self-conscious about like the hips and stomach. The fabric feels nice. While I wore it, I didn’t feel like there was any scratchiness or discomfort, especially at the top with the sparkly areas that could provide that scratchy feeling. The back is also very traditional. It has a little bit of a V shape so the top of your back, but it is definitely super traditional, super conservative and I would by no means consider this a risqué look. I am 5‘3“ tall and this reaches a bit past my ankles, so keep this in mind if you are taller because if you are taller than 5‘4“ this may be much shorter than you may want. Otherwise, if you are my height or shorter, I think you will be very pleased with the length of this dress and the fit. the back is closed with a zipper, but there is stretch to the top of the dress so I didn’t even need to unzip it in order to put it on. There is one area that I am displaced with and the reason I’m giving this a four out of five. if you look at the color that is being advertised as maroon, there is a purpleish tint to it that is not present at all in the actual dress. Now, the dress I received is definitely maroon and what I would consider maroon under normal circumstances; however, the advertising does not match the actual dress color and that might make a difference, if what you wanted was more of a purpleish tint rather than red.

Great dress, bad packaging! This is a review from a plus-sized person, which I am considered even though it's just my chest. ^^; The dress is great, no stretch and completely opaque. It's made from a strudy uniform type material. I'm 5'5", 190ish pounds and a 40 I cup, and the 3XL has room in the chest area still. It's flattering and cute! The shipping was fast but I expected a mailer. Nope! They just slapped a label on the plastice packaging and sent it out. I would have rated this five stars except anyone could have stolen this dress at anytime.

Super Great Dress in a Pinch , Has Slight Defects You Can Fix Was in a rush to get a dress less than 24 hours before I needed to fly out of town for a formal wedding. I bought this dress + five other options, and this one was by far the nicest one. I am 5' 7.25" tall, 145 pounds, and measurements are 36-28-38. I bought a size M and felt it was really big in the chest area - with the cups of the dress sown in a very low location. It did fit me just right in the hips though - so I don't think I could have sized down to have the chest area be smaller. I am a 34 D normally. Because the cups were sown sort of low and in, I had to bring the dress up quite a bit with the adjustable straps so the dress had more of an empire waist look for me rather than sitting at my natural waist, as pictured. I also ended up wearing a push up bra with double-sided tape to get the line of the dress over my chest to look right. I wore short heels ( >3 inches) and the length on this dress was fine. If you are shorter this dress may not work. Definitely plan on getting a push-up/padded adhesive bra for this one - the strapless bra I had wasn't low cut enough in the center. I also had to safety pin the slit in two spots to get it to lay in a more flattering manner - without a pin it would have been really revealing while moving. I also wasn't wild about the straps - they were really plain - so I just wore my hair down to cover them. You could wear a wrap or shawl of some kind to accomplish the same thing. Overall, this was a great dress with a really pretty material for the price. It wasn't perfect in terms of the sewing, but I fixed this with some pinning, padding and double-sided tape, and dressed it up with accessories and in the end I felt like I was one of the best dressed people at the wedding.

Event Dressing Perfection!! When I looked in the mirror after getting trying this dress on, I had to take a step back and give myself a mental high five. This dress is soooooo good! The velvet is sumptuous and luxurious. The color I received is a deep midnight navy. The length is almost to the floor on me. The beading at the waist really steps the style up a notch. There's also ruching that snatches your waist and makes you look like you lost a few pounds. That's really hard to do in a fabric like velvet. There are cups sewn into the bust, but I didn't want to take a chance on them. I'm wearing a regular bra with the straps pushed down. Even though this is a strapless dress, you won't get the dreaded armpit fat. You can adjust the fabric to cover what you would rather hide. There's a side split that shows just the right amount of leg. The overall fit runs a full size small, though the fabric has stretch (but not much). I usually wear a 10. The 12 just barely fits. I definitely could have used a support garment to smooth my back fat. Overall, this is a GORGEOUS dress that will be the hit of any event. You could never be a wallflower in this dress. For fit reference, I'm 5'6", 153lbs and a 34G bra size. I'm wearing the 12. I usually wear a 10. Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided makes your decision a little easier.

Strange Fit! RETURNED! --If this review helped you, please click " "-- OK, so I'm going to call this dress Monet. From afar, it looks so cute...you get close up and notice a lot of strange things about it. The dress came with certain parts of the fabric discolored slightly. I thought it was because of the folding and tried to rub it out with my hands but it didn't work. You could still see it in the light. The very top of the tube part of the dress flared out...it looked strange and you could see right down into my bra if you were taller than me and looked down. It was like it was sewn funny. The bottom was way too long and made it hard to walk, too! I will say that the dress was slimming - a lot more slimming than I thought. I didn't need to wear a shaper. It could have been the color but that was a positive aspect about the dress for me. I'm 5'6", 140 lbs, size 4/6, and curvy. I ordered a medium and it fit fine. I could have squeezed into a small but it would have been like a sausage casing. Meh, save your money. It is way too expensive for some off-brand Amazon dress anyways and it isn't a great fit. --For more Amazon reviews, follow @CassandraMercedes on Instagram--

Decent but not the best (For reference, I am 5’1 43” bust, 37” waist, 47 1/2” hips) Bought this dress to wear to my niece’s princess themed party. I thought it was pretty, but I was disappointed in the color choices. The fabric is thin, cheap-feeling (to be expected honestly) and staticky, and the dress itself was a bit too long for my taste. I felt it covered my body shape a bit too much and wasn’t as flattering as I hoped. I think the dress would be more flattering if the waist had elastic instead. The chest part has a button for you to keep on or unbutton for less coverage. I kept mine buttoned in the photos. It is a fun and flowy dress, and it fit as expected, but I think I will be returning for a different one that better matches my body type. :)

Beautiful but bust material is cut too short (Height: 5'4", weight: ???, bust: 44", waist 34", hips 47") I was going to use this as my wedding dress since I'm having an outdoor wedding in January on a frozen lake on a snowy mountaintop in Colorado. I don't care about a white dress in all the white snow and ice. I first ordered this dress in a size large and it fit great everywhere except the bust. The width was fine but the length of material connecting the shoulders to the empire waist was...not nearly enough. It made it so the empire waist was really ¼ of the way up my boobs lol. I could pull it down to sit in the right place but then DO NOT MOVE or it will slide back up. That's not how I want to live my life so I returned it and tried my luck with the XL. It fit a little larger everywhere which I didn't really want but the bust...was a bust once again. Too short, same problem. I didn't want to return it because I loved it otherwise but sadly it had to go back. Very warm and flattering and the material feels nice. The length dragged on the floor all around by about 2 or 3 inches but that was fine for my purposes. Could have lived with it. The bust though, couldn't live with it. Wish I could have kept it. If you order this, be smaller chested basically and you probably won't have the same issue as me and some of the other reviwers who've had the same issue.

Pretty Dress - Formal - 8 Petite - Navy (Matt's Wife here) I bought this dress to go to a formal Gala. Size is 8 Petite. I am 5'3 and 145lbs. I hold a lot of weight in my mid-section & the front tie helps a lot. Oh and this dress has pockets!! I liked the dress and had so many compliments. The shoes were also purchased on Amazon: LifeStride Women's Sanya Pump

Love this dress! (Measurements at the end) I really love this dress, it’s one of my favorites! The red is so vibrant and the style gives a sense of an older era. The pockets are so big too! The dress goes just a bit below my knees. I also wore a petticoat with this to make it poof out, it’s a bit flat without one. The only thing I don’t like is that for the neckline, when I bend low or over, it shows a lot more than I like. If I had more in the chest area it’d probably fit better there. Also the material itself is just a bit cheap-feeling. Overall though, this is such a nice dress and I got many compliments on it! Measurements - Waist: 27” Bust: 33.5” Hips: 32” Height: 5’3”

Barbie APPROVED (REAL REVIEW, not paid for my opinion, I actually bought this dress!!) This dress EXCEEDED my expectations!! To start, the color is a vibrant hot pink and so “Barbie Girl“! The fit is exceptionally nice and flattering! With the corset lace up back with satin ribbon matching the color of the dress, sizing can be adjusted to fit what is comfortable with your style! This magnificent gown also has an adjustable bra type of strap that helps hold up the top. The bedazzling is on the entirety of the dress, with most being on the corset top and beautifully placed on the skirt, adding to the elegance of this dress! The length is perfect for me, I’m 5’3” and it hits the floor with a little extra allowing me to wear flats or heels and still being comfortable enough to walk. To be extravagant you could even add a petty coat under the dress which will enhance your figure and make this dress really pop! This dress looks like it cost well over $200, but I only paid $65!

Pretty! ****the missing star is only for the way the fabric feels, not how it looks or fits. I love this dress, I just wish (and expected) the fabric were higher quality satin for $53. It looks amazing and my boyfriend freaked out seeing me in it. Also, please excuse the fact that it needs to be ironed badly in the pic There’s almost zero stretch, so make sure you’re paying attention to the waist size in the size chart since it’s a back zip. The bust has play/adjustability from the tie-back strap, so that’s not as important to get exactly right. I’m 5’5, 24” waist, 32f and this fit well :) Zero stretch also means it’s not a dress that as easy to take off running in, since full leg movement is kind of restricted. I’m new to wearing dresses (I prefer to live in athleisure), so this is not the comfiest for me, but I still love it for special occasions.

Beautiful for price- read the review! **Update** The bump has grown and am at 35 weeks. Still fits like a dream! Did our maternity photos and am so happy! You could only see a little of my underwear line but hardly. And I’ll keep this for future events because it’s not a maternity dress, just super stretchy. Yeah! 4 stars because it doesn’t look too much like the Amazon ad BUT I do love it. **Ordered a small for being petite** I had bought this because I am 1) short- 5 feet tall, 2) short torsoed, 3) usually smaller breasts- I have 34B, and 4) have a smaller bump- 32 weeks but measuring at 29 weeks. I needed something that hugged me but stretched...the other dress from another retailer looked like a bag and was quickly sent back. Pre- pregnancy I weighed 120 and currently weigh 137, I have thicker thighs and a bigger booty (peach butt). I was a 32A pre-pregnancy and 34B now and the top is only a little loose. This is like polyester stretch- so it has a cottony feel but super stretchy and has the length that I need, but again I am short. **If you are curvier or taller, I would size up.** Being pregnant causes the zipper to bunch in the back, but for photos I don’t care. **I do have cellulite!** You can see my big booty undy lines but hubby said I didn’t need to wear the shapers since he couldn’t see anything- even when I stood in the sun (I would say there’s somewhat of a thickness but not too heavy). If I had gotten any lighter colors, I’d wear a shaper (just for my own self confidence). This is for my maternity shoot in 3 weeks and will definitely still use since there’s a lot of stretch and looks beautiful on. Can’t beat the price either! I’ll update the review once we get our photos taken.

Beautiful (See through) **Update** It was perfect for my shower! I bought maternity shapewear (nude) to wear underneath which kept it from being see-through. The dress was comfortable and lightweight (perfect when pregnant haha) I bought this dress for my baby shower this weekend and I’m so happy I did! I guessed the size, it is beautiful, comfortable and light weight. The only upsetting part is it is see through. Luckily I noticed when the sunlight shined on me in the bathroom so I quickly ordered maternity shapewear for underneath. Other than that I think this dress is gorgeous and flattering and is perfect pregnant or not! Don’t mind my dirty mirrors please, I swear they were clean yesterday 😂 ALSO** It lands right above my feet too so perfect length. However, if shorter or not pregnant the dress will most likely be longer. I am 36 weeks pregnant and 5’7

Pretty cute *EDITS/ADDITIONS TO REVIEW* Originally ordered in maroon/burgundy color & loved dress so I ordered red brown for a summer wedding. Overall I think these dresses are so cute and classy. Each time I’ve purchased this dress I’ve bought it on sale and feel like it warrants the sale price. I do love these dresses but I’m not sure I’d say they’re worth ~$50 regularly but you can decide for yourself. I will note fabric is thin & I think it’s best suited for a warmer occasion. I know a lot of wrap dresses can make dancing & moving around a bit scandalous but I haven’t worn these out yet to test. I do feel like they wrap far enough over you don’t have to stress too much since there’s a good amount of overlap. My only complaint is no hanger straps on these dresses. Medium maroon/burgundy review - Top is a bit baggier than expected. But I think it’s pretty flattering even on my smaller chest. The fabric is thin & has a satin feel but no sheen. Overall I really like this dress. Great length on my 5’5 height, & very flattering over all. Do really like that it has a side zipper & you don’t have to shimmy it over your body. Small and medium red brown review - the color is more of a dusty pink than a red or brown but I went off of previous reviews and chose this color anyway for a summer wedding. I preferred the fit of medium over small & if I order more colors in future I’ll order mediums. The small fit my body fine (all photos are in size mediums) but the elastic in the neckline was stretched out in the small and made the top slightly uncomfortable. Overall still really like these dresses and would order again. The true test though would be wearing them out for the night and seeing how they hold up.

I had previously picked out a different formal, red dress with a $400 price, but decided to take a gamble on this one just in case... and I'm so glad I did! You won't be sorry if you take the gamble too!!

Perfect *please excuse the fact that it needs to be ironed in the pic I love this dress. It’s gorgeous, it can be sinched in a four-point corset, and it’s true to size chart. The main part of the dress is a zip, but there are two loops on each side of the back of the dress and an included string of the same satin fabric to make it even more adjustable. Very little stretch to the fabric, so it can get tight on the thighs taking long steps, and it’s definitely important to size right. Not a dress you can take off running in. I’m not one to wear anything without a bra (32f and need all the support I can get), but I felt comfortable not wearing one with this. My boyfriend also loves it :’)

Loooooong *Pre apologies for the not great photos, I was obviosly not the center of focus on my sister's wedding. Full disclosure, i'm wearing a body shaper that goes from the underwire of my bra, to mid thigh* I wore this for my sister's wedding in early may. The color was perfect, the fit was comfortable, the dress was just 3 or 4 inches too long for me. (I'm 5'3" and 225lbs, 40K bust, size 18-20 pants.) I just folded, pinned, and sewed around to bring the hem up. The material was light in weight, breathable, and not see through. Not warm enough to spend much time outside in early spring in Colorado. (When I tried the dress on, I was wearing an unlined bra, and was told you could see my n!p outline, but I wore a lined/padded bra day of so you could not see that.) I really appreciate that the dress came with a tube top for modesty, I did use this in these photos. It covered the band of my bra all around my back. I chose to do a one shoulder style, by twisting the two lengths of 'strap' and wrapping around my waist and tying in the back. I received a lot of compliments, and will likely wear this again if I need to dress up for anything.

Perfect fitting • I’m 4’10 short • 125-127lbs with a mom pooch • 34D chest size • pear shaped • Wearing high heels in all of the pictures shown, except the mirror pictures. I was barefoot in the mirror pictures. The dress was under my feet without heels, and barely touching the floor with 4 or 5 inch heels. I walked without stepping on the dress so that’s a huge plus. I’m definitely going to go get it hemmed just a couple inches, bc I love the long elegant look ❤️ Went to a church event, the back was a bit too revealing so I bought the white covering from Macys, & added the golden belt with white pearls . Wore gold heels, which you barely saw. Dress is super comfy, material is thick, please please PLEASE wear a girdle/shapewear. Many of the reviews make the dress look bad bc the women are not wearing shapers, THIS MAKES ALL THE DIFFERENCE. VERSATILE!! I wanted modesty so I wore the dress up & covering the shoulders, but it looks SO BEAUTIFUL with one shoulder showing. Or you can show both, beautiful either ways. Great quality, zipper was easy to zip to by myself, easy to slip in and out of , very breathable, and made my body shape look good. I don’t have a big bottom but this dress made me look like I have some junk in the trunk lol . I posted all the different angles of the dress , I wouldn’t recommend getting this dress! I didn’t face to iron or steam it, though I should have on the top part. But the packaging was great, neatly folded and not just thrown in the bag like other dresses from Amazon

True to size! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 I really love this dress and I was so happy that it is available in long sleeves! I went to a wedding on the east coast and it was still pretty chilly at night so the sleeves were great and I didn’t have to keep messing with a shall or jacket all night. I’m 5’3” and weigh roughly 165. I bought a large and it fit like a GLOVE!!! I wash it in the machine but hang to dry, seems like the type of material that might tighten up too much in a hot dryer. I will buy this in short sleeves and different prints for the summer. Also, super nice for dancing with a split hi-low effect, it shows all the good bits and none of the bad. Almost forgot to mention, I’m a 36 DD up top, just enough room for the gurlz!

Weird smell, decent quality, super long. 1. As soon as I opened the bag there was a very strong fishy smell. It did not come out the first time I washed it but the smell did go away after the second wash with a cup of white vinegar added. 2. The bodice or top is very sturdy and feels well made. However, the ruched waist band detail was glued in place on the right side and the glue started peeling after the first time I washed it. Not noticeable when being worn. 3. There is no zipper. You have to lace yourself into and out of this dress. 4. It is SUPER long. I'm 5ft 8in and wearing 5in heels in the pics. The sleeves trail about 1ft past the train of the dress. 5. It has pockets! But that's kind of a down side for this dress because of the way it interferes with the silhouette of the dress and makes an unattractive pooch on either hip. I tried to capture that in the pics. 6. The mesh in the front is not unflattering or awkward looking. I like it, as it adds to the support and sturdiness of the bustline. 7. It's actually made of a chiffon type material and NOT a cheap tulle material. Overall I'm very happy with it and think it will make a great halloween costume after I shorten the sleeves. It's a good deal overall and fits nicely. I would recommend buying it.

Excellent! 48 years old 5’3 158lbs at the moment :( measurements 39-31-41 and needed a dress for my nephew’s wedding. Thought it would be hard to find a dress to flatter my short, overweight physique, but this dress makes me really happy! I bought a large which pains me to buy as the weight has been creeping on but I realize how height, weight, measurements, and size details are in a review. I was concerned the fabric wouldn’t be nice, a lot of the time the material is a little too t-shirt-like for my taste (too casual) and I definitely didn’t want to go in the opposite direction and getting something in a satin finish… this is a perfect middle ground. Soft and comfortable and polished without being shiny. The fit is perfect and fairly flattering even for my extra padded areas. Very pleased, may buy in another color but not sure I have a need for it. I just want another! So cute. Go for it! I think you’ll also be glad you did.

5 stars. I’d give it more if I could. I bought this for a formal attire wedding and received so many compliments. I happily told everyone who would listen it was from Amazon and cost less than $50. Great Value for Price; Very Comfortable 5’ 4.5”, 145 lbs ish, athletic build. Purchased medium. The navy blue is a great shade - not too dark so it looks black, and also not too bright/cobalt. Incredibly stretchy all over. I probably could have sized down to a small, however a medium was comfortable and didn’t cling anywhere. The material is a little thin so you’ll need seamless undergarments (or nothing) if you want the dress to fall smooth. The neckline shows regular bra straps, so go strapless/stick on/nothing/or do you. Thigh split on the left leg came up a few inches above my knee, but didn’t feel too revealing when walking or sitting. Dress was a bit long on me (5’4.5”, with 3” heels) so it drags in the back when I walk. Because if the slit, I don’t step on it when walking, so I won’t be getting it hemmed. Overall, great value for the price. The material seems like it should hold up a few washes but may pill over time and will definitely snag if caught on something (jewelry, benches, etc.). Some wrinkles after hanging to dry, but they steamed out easily.

Soft like satin/silk 5' 8" 198lbs. Hello all. I'm writing this review to help you decide. First I am 6 months post partum and not breastfeeding. For the picture I am not wearing a control top, which I probably will get a control top with shorts for the dresses. I am wearing a molded (padded) underwire bra. I washed the clothes on cold delicate cycle and dried on delicate cycle, then I ironed them. I am writing multiple reviews for clothes I bought for prime day so this part is the informational section I am putting on all the reviews. I measure around 43"over bust-36" narrowest part of waist-46"widest part of hips. Not too difficult to iron. Very soft like satin or silk. I bought XXL just in case. I'll definitely be buying XL once I lose 10lbs. Very purple compared to the picture on amazon.

Perfect LBD 5’0”, size 16-18 depending on brand, 38C It fit so well! There’s a bit of stretch so there’s wiggle room and it was comfortable. There’s no boning. It hit right at the knee even though I’m short so no hemming was needed. No alterations were needed at all actually. I received this dress a day before a photo session and I was fortunately able to wear it straight out of the packaging, so the size chart provided is accurate and there was no weird smell that clothes purchased online sometimes have. As someone in between straight and plus sizing, I’m self conscious about my weight and but I thought I looked good in it despite it being a sheath-style (A-lines typically work better to hide the belly and flatter larger figures, which I normally prefer). I’m 31 and it doesn’t look too young and trendy, but it doesn’t look too old or matronly either. I think it’s a great design for anyone regardless of age or weight. I don’t have an LBD so this is perfect for dressy-casual events, not too plain and not over the top.

I tried wearing something with sleeves to go over the dress but the damage had already been done. I had this dress on for maybe 15 minutes and the sequins were just cutting into my skin. If your arms touch your sides when you’re relaxed and you don’t plan on wearing something under or over with sleeves you will regret it. Yes it’s a shiny pretty dress but it is not worth the pain I promise. It is also extremely short in the front and if I didn’t put a petticoat on underneath you would’ve easily seen my flower. I honestly don’t understand all the outstanding reviews, what about everyone’s arms?!

As advertised 5’6’’, 140lbs. Bought the small. This is it right out of the bag. Def short but drapes just right. I might use a little double sided tape to make sure the front doesn’t gape too much. Looks cute, but could have ordered a size down 5'6" and 230 lbs. I ordered the XL and honestly, the L probably would have been better. The belt on this is helping to cinch the waist a bit and is really the main reason that I can still wear this and it isn't too big. Given that for most other clothing I'm wearing an XL or XXL, the fact that I probably would do better in an L for this dress tells me that this dress runs a little big. Maybe that's really dependent on body shape. While I'm a bigger size, I do have a fairly traditional hourglass type shape, so depending on your body shape, results may vary. Either way, the material itself feels nice and light, flowy, and comfortable. The deep red color looks really nice, and there is plenty of coverage on the chest that I would happily wear this to work and not worry about showing too much cleavage, or too much leg (while still being decently low cut and having wrap slit.

Decent Pants 5'6" Waist 31" Hips 39" I got a large. The pants are decent. I am not a huge fan of the material (it is light and breathable but I think it is the type to rub and fray against a purse or between your thighs or something like that, but only time will tell). The cut is fantastic though! The waist line itself has little to no stretch, but the wide leg allows for plenty of thigh room so you don't really need it. I got a large and sizing down or up would not fit for sure. My one complaint is that I feel like the seam on the backside is a tad asymmetrical, like I have to keep twisting the pants so it will be in the right place. They came pretty wrinkled I don't know how the material would take to a steaming yet. Overall, if you're looking for cheap pants that look alright I would recommend these.

The pleating in the stomach region hides any lumps/bumps, which I love! The chest is low enough to be feminine without being too revealing. Overall a very pretty dress for date night or a wedding!

Do Not Dryer! Line Dry Only! 5’8” & 150lbs, Size Medium. A bit short but not too short especially if you wear shorts or tights underneath. Very cute, comfortable to wear, easy to get on and off (there is a side zipper). The material is stretchy. Bad news: first wash, After ONE round in the dryer- the elastic fibers were sticking out all over the seams, very noticeable because there they were all over! Seems to be okay to wash it but NOT put in the dryer. Concerned about the durability over time, but I have worn it twice and other than the elastic fibers it’s fine. Wrinkles very easily also!

Beautiful Lavender Dress A cute option for homecomings and proms. The lavender color is gorgeous. The beading and sequins are actually done very well for this price point. I was really surprised. It is a nice length to show off some leg but not too much. The cons for me and that seem to be a trend with dresses like this are: -The heavy use of glitter. You will drip glitter everywhere you go. While I love doing this energetically, physically leaving a trail of glitter is a little much. -The oversized and over padding bust cups. There is way too much stiff padding in this dress and the cups are huge. As an A cup, my girls were swimming in this dress. It honestly seems as dressmakers now are not sizing the cups in porportion to the dress sizes, choosing to use a one size fits all approach in this area. I ordered the size 2 and honestly should have gone with a 0 as I had to pull the straps all the way closed in order for it to stay up so I didn't have the slightly open back look. I am 5'10, 118 lbs, 31A-25-34 for reference.

A STUNNING SHOW-STOPPER! A dress that speaks louder than words! I purchased this dress on a whim, less than 4 days away from an event. I was not expecting it to look better than the online photos, fit the body like a glove, with more than enough stretch, to include I was looking for some of the gold beading to pop off at some point (none did). I hope these photos will give you a vivid description on the presentation of this dress. It truly looks as beautiful as it does in the images. If you are short like me 5'3 and under, you going to need a 3 1/2 to 4 inch hill or the dress will drag. If you don't care for a plunging neck line, then add material as I did. I weigh 165 and I purchased a lg dress and it fit perfectly. Lastly keep in mind that a little past mid thigh, the becomes sheer.

As you can see from my photos it is not very noticeable at all, especially in certain lighting. But if you go under blacklight, they will glow at differently.

Love dress - try b4 buy is used condition Absolutely love the dress - fell in love w dress @ local store but didn’t like color. Ordered burgundy and navy to decide. Navy was purchased and burgandy was try b4 buy. Immediately, noticed packaging had a lot of packaging tape not typical from Amazon. Then found dress was soiled - mostly on sides and armpit area plus some animal hairs. Appears armpits discolored from sweat & deodorant transfer from wearing for a long period of time. Buyer beware - item may be used & sold as new, yet price is not adjusted. Aside from condition - The dress is amazing. Every color is great. Very comfortable, quality materials, lace over a thin stretchy dress with a matching slip attached. Love the design to help camouflage our imperfections! I’m 5’4” 140. I never usually need petite but the regular size in this dress is x-long. Best fit was 8, regular length was still too long with heels, a little higher prefer. The 8 petite fit like a glove - short enough u can see the front of feet and not such a tripping hazard. Photos attached in same shoes of petite and regular 8 to show difference. Color is most accurate in photo next to navy dress. Pics trying to show soiled areas do not show color correct. Burgundy and Navy are true deep and rich colors. - just Beautiful! Highly recommend dress! Just use caution on the try b4 buy option!

Beautiful dress According to the size chart I am a small. That’s what I ordered and it fit well, aside from being a little big in the bust. I’m 5’10” 125# 32B and it just skimmed the top of my feet, so definitely on the long side. I ordered the standard “off the rack” dress rather than the custom altered dress because of my time constraints, and waited 5-6 weeks with standard shipping. The color was true to the listing, and the dress is heavy and expensive in both look and feel, with a nice, full skirt. (And pockets!!!) I wasn’t able to tell from the pictures that the sleeves are see through, which unfortunately won’t work for me, so I’ll be returning. But I won’t hesitate to use this seller again when I have more time to custom order and get it more fitted in the bust for me.

According to the size chart, I was supposed to ... According to the size chart, I was supposed to fit in a size 6. That was too large, so I tried a 6 petite. Again, too large. So I tried a 4. Too large. Eventrually I found that a 2 was my size. I am 5'4.5" and weigh 125 lbs. The 2 fit perfectly. Also, the beading on the 1st three dresses that I purchased was not silver, it was a royal blue, which gave the whole dress a blue/grey effect. The size 2 that I eventually ended up with had silver beading (which is what I wanted anyways) and was much more sparkly than the other 3 dresses. Not sure what makes the difference since I ordered the same dress 4 times with sizes being the only variation. One last thing to consider. I wore this as a bridesmaid for a wedding and found the after that the beading is coming off in multiple places. The dress does come with a small bag of extra beading, but that just shows that they expect the beading to fall off because of the fragile state of the dress. Even after all this, I'm still giving it a 5 star rating because the dress is simply gorgeous! I was so sparkly and classy. It was very flattering. Worth the hassle. (I am in the middle of this pic; the ribbon was added)
cute and comfortable Accurate description of dress and color. I’m 5’7”, bust 35, waist 29. Wearing a medium. Probably could’ve gotten a small but there’s also zero stretch.

Shockingly good Actually loved this dress. Got it last minute for a rehearsal dinner boat cruise and it worked perfectly. Material was luxe feeling. Only thing is I wish it would have been more fitted to the waist and “cinched” me more, but overall still loved! Length was good at my height 5’2, but might be short on taller ladies. The small for me good and me measurements are 36 28 39.
Works well for curves Actually works well for curvy people. I’m 36-26-40 and this fit! Woot woot
Super cute! Adorable dress! Lovely color. Great quality. She is 5’3”.

Adrianna Pappel always makes a stunning dress, and this dress IS stunning. I chose the gunmetal colored dress in size 8, and as usual it fits very true to size. I'm 5'4" and 155lbs, and wear a size 8 in regular clothes. I'm wearing a corset and shapewear to hide my tummy, and as form fitting as this dress is, you couldn't tell what I was attempting to hide under it. It is VERY long (I'm in 5" heels) but I never tripped over the length, nor did anyone stand on the train, remarkably! The entire night I received a TON of compliments. I've pictured another dress by Adrianna Pappel (blue) in a side by side of this dress for comparison. Between the two, I'm thrilled I went with this one! As usual with this designer, the beading is quite detailed and sparkly, which makes the dress heavier than most. I happen to LOVE the weight of her dresses and wear it more like armor than something dainty. Highly recommend!

Beautiful Mother of the Bride choice. Affordable, Flattering, Beautiful plus size option! My mother is SUPER self conscious and heavier in the middle. I feel that she looked amazing in this dress. She’s about 5’3 so we did get it cut just a bit.

Love Love Love my BEAUTIFUL $40 wedding dress!!!! After 10 years together, we wanted to get married on Leap Day, and decided elope to Vegas 10 days before. Well, Amazon prolly hates me, bc I ordered (and now returned) about 20 outfits/ dresses,(not to mention all the shopping IRL) trying desparately to find the pefect one...and then.... I felt like I struck gold with this dress! I'm not sure if you'd call it off white or a soft white, the color was pretty. The cut was very flattering on me- it played up my boobs and legs ( I carry all my weight in the belly so, yeah). I'm 5'7", 163, and I wore an XL. It has a nice weight, not like a true wedding dress, but not at all flimsy like some others I tried. One of my bracelets did keep getting caught on the lace, but it was maybe the wrong bracelet to wear. Now, you'll see I have a photo of the back of it. The dress did totally fit me, HOWEVER this is what happens when you can't zip it yourself, then forget to ask hubby, who never says anything bc he thinks thats how the dress is supposed to be. And he was right, it didnt look bad, lol pretty funny. I wore a cropped jean jacket for some photos and that looked cute as well. Highly recommend this bargain of a dress, esp for a 2nd wedding.... Looking back, Im sorry I didnt also try this on in the gray or pink, that wouldve been really cute also.

STUNNING. Amazon for the SAVE!!! After a small fiasco when the department store i had ordered a very expensive M.O.T.B dress sent the WRONG SIZE and had no more in my size, I panicked! I was left thinking only 3 weeks to the wedding Amazon was my only hope. I didn't have much faith so I ordered 6 dresses in different sizes--just in case. One had to fit and not look cheap. I crossed my fingers and Amazon CAME THRU! I ordered 3 of these dresses: two in black/gold in two different sizes and this gem in gold. I have to say THESE DRESSES ARE STUNNING!!!! I'm sad to have to return this gold dress (not because it wasn't beautiful and didn't fit but because it's too close to the wedding parties dresses) but the black and gold? OMG...breathtaking! I felel and look like a princess! And I didn't even open the other dresses--I found my PERFECT dress at a fraction of the original mis-sizes dress I had order i had bought. For the record, I am 5'11" and between a 16-18. I was able to comfortably fit into an XL. Perfect coverage for my upper arms and because it's a semi formal evening wedding at a museum, this color us perfect! It's high quality, doesn't require any altering. Secretly, I wish I had somewhere to wear the gold dress because I'd keep it if I could justify wearing it again! (Would cleaning the house in this gown be over the top? 😂) It's absolutely worth e ery penny. Made extremely well, not too low cut and it's appropriately long enough. I am so happy and a bit sad to have to send back the other dresses but thanks to Amazon for again SAVING THE DAY!!!!

PERFECT! Great price, great fit! After almost 20dresses later this one was a perfect match for the sage green color scheme for my son’s baptism. I am normally a XXL but ordered a 3xl and 4xl since I am post partum and after reading the reviews. I used both a strapless bra and under garment and had plenty of room. Great length and the rouching is PERFECT and in all the right places. ! My measurements are 16/18, XL/XXL, 42DDD. Definitely recommend… I will be buying more colors.

Yet another big bust fail. After downloading the size chart, it clearly states that an XL bust is 48 inches - this is not correct. I am a 42G bust and could not zip it over my chest. It was so tight but when I nearly got it zipped it was near suffocating me. Not to mention the pleat-like draping on the bust looks really awkward. Like. Really really. And the points sit directly at my nips - which is even weirder for a dress that’s supposed to look more classic. The fabric does feel better quality than most clothing here but there is almost zero stretch so it feels very rigid on. In the pictures this dress looks beautiful, in person, it’s bunchy and awkward. I’m sure it is beautiful for small or average sized busts, but I would not recommend for any big bust gals. It’s not it. Sadly this dress is yet another thing I’ll either have to set aside until after getting a breast reduction or pass on to someone else.

Fits great! After dress shopping at a mall for 3 hours I went on amazon and immediately found this dress. It’s perfect for a wedding. Super comfy and great fit. I’m 5’7.5” and 150lbs and got a Medium.

Sexy, but made for large chests only. After looking at a few other reviews, I decided to try this dress a try in a size larger than normal as others were stating that it fits very small. I am 5' 8.5", a 39 hips and 29 waist. I purchased a size large and I think it fits beautifully...mostly. I am a 36 B or C, and you can see in the pictures that there's a lot of extra fabric up in the chest area to the point that the dress just doesn't fit well. I imagine if I took it to a seamstress they could somehow adjust that area down for me, but I truly believe it would fit better on somebody with a D cup chest. It is truly a stunning dress, but keeping it as it is I could only wear it with a coat or maybe a scarf around my shoulders to hide that area. I might try padding my bra with some of those extra cups from a bikini top just to make it work, because I love it otherwise!

Best option I could find with my height and weight! After looking for weeks for a bridal shower dress I finally found this one. Of course the dress looks better on somebody smaller but it ended up turning out very well for me. I’m 6’1” and I often have a hard time finding floor length dresses. The slip didn’t go all the way down to the floor but the outside of the dress did. I was also surprised that the dress didn’t slip down and stayed on me pretty well. I wore it all day, and was very comfortable in it. The only thing that I would change about the dress is where the placement of the seams are. There is a strip that runs right down the bottom of your butt, causing it to accentuate the area.

Absolutely perfect for our beach wedding After many years of being together, we decided to get married on the beach during an upcoming trip to Florida. We planned our wedding 4 daysin advance. We had to arrange every, including buying my dress! Originally I ordered the Large. It was a bit too tight. It also didn't have the lace at the top as shown online. I then ordered the XL. It was made more like the online picture. It did not have cups sewn into the fabric like the Large did. That was fine with me. The XL was a bit too large so I altered it myself. The sheath underneath and the length of the dress was a good bit longer than the Large. I had to take in the sides of the top portion and the sides of the lace of the skirt. For the money, this dress is very pretty! And, it is really comfortable. It's very stretchy. I'm really happy with it. I'm 5'4 and weigh 148. I have a very straight body and not many curves. Generally, I wear a size 10 in most clothes. Sometimes I wear a 12 in a dress due to my bust size (38D). The dress is of decent quality, especially considering the cost. I'm very glad I bought it. Both dresses arrived the day after I ordered them. I'm adding a picture of our wedding. The dress was perfect. I received a lot of compliments on it when I sent the picture to my friends.

It’s worth it After my David’s bridal dress got lost in the mail, I headed over to Amazon in search of a new bridesmaid dress and found this one ! I love this dress it was comfortable , and flowed beautifully, color perfect , I’m 234lbs and 40ddd 5,7 and ordered a size18 it has a tie up back to it’s adjustable! I felt amazing in this dress

I loved it!!❤️ After not being able to make up my mind, I ordered my dress at the last minute for my brother’s wedding. “I literally tried my dress on for the 1st time, one day before the wedding!”😅 I ordered a small, “omg” was I pushing it, I thought. But, I tried it on and it fit perfectly! I wasn’t worried about the “wagon” lol..😂 “cause ain’t much weight back there.” I was so.. concerned about “them girls” that sit up front.😮 Lol!! But, everything was good.😰 This dress is perfect! I received so… many compliments. I made a good choice! I didn’t ask my brother bf posting, so I cut he and my new sister from the photo. I decided to post, bc bf I decided to buy I was so leery, due to not being able to see anyone my size in the reviews. So.. here I am for all the “fun sized girls!” 4’11 145lbs 38DDD. “Buy this dress girl!” Oh, one more thing. Be very gentle with the zipper. The little thingy that you hold onto to pull the zipper up and down, detached from the zipper. 😢 “My zipper helper was really, really scrong…🤷🏽‍♀️😮🤦🏾‍♀️ Ok, I’ve said enough. “Bye!”

Felt Beautiful at Son’s Wedding! After ordering 10 Alex Evenings dresses, this was the winner! I am 5’7”, 190 pounds, and purchased a perfect fitting size 16, as recommended. The lycra cannot be steamed or ironed; instead, dip wrinkles in water and they disappear. Yes, the dress is unhemmed swimsuit material, but it sucked me into a svelte woman and corralled my flabby arm waddles! Received numerous compliments. This dress is magic! Do not hesitate. Buy it!

Perfect roaring 20’s or Event After ordering 3 order dresses in 2 sizes each (short flapper dresses) I decided to go with a long dress and this did not disappoint! It was gorgeous and I received a ton of compliments. I did also pair mine with a mermaid petticoat underneath so that the bottom of the skirt would flare and it was perfect! I’m 5’8 and 190lbs bottom heavy and the L 12/14 fit me perfect and wore a 2inch kitten heel

Perfect fit! After ordering no less than 7 different dresses for a wedding, this was the last thing I ordered and I wish it has been the first! As soon as I put it on I knew it was the one. I am a 12/14 and 38 DD with a short torso and basically a mommy mid section. This fit me in all the right places. I 10/10 recommend this gorgeous dress for any special occasion you have.

BUY THE DRESS!!! After purchasing 7 dresses for my son’s wedding I found this gem days before the wedding. It was flattering, cheap and comfortable. Apparently wearing black to a wedding is a “thing” now, who knew?! I got so many compliments on the dress and the ruffle part hid my tiny bit of belly fat for the win. I am 5”10 162 lbs and the large fit me perfect.
